variants.name: Are Ya Chicken?
variants.restrictionsText: Four slots in your formation are occupied by chickens.

variants.name: Mad Cow Disease
variants.restrictionsText: Mad cows spawn randomly during the adventure Every few seconds they spit at a random hero, reducing their attack speed by 50% for 10 seconds

variants.name: The Contagious Curse
variants.restrictionsText: Two random slots in your formation are cursed The curses change slots every 15 seconds Heroes in cursed slots are stunned and cannot attack.

variants.name: Friendly Imps
variants.restrictionsText: Three friendly imps take up slots in your formation and try to help you out Unfortunately, they're not very effective

variants.name: Pure Energy
variants.restrictionsText: "Pure Energy" enemies spawn randomly during the adventure They cannot be attacked or killed, and must be tanked until you can progress or your formation is overwhelmed

variants.name: Maddening
variants.restrictionsText: The damage of your heroes is reduced by 2% with each enemy killed as they slowly go mad This debuff resets when you change areas or defeat a boss

variants.name: Were-verpowered
variants.restrictionsText: Were-beasts have their health, damage, and speed dramatically increased

variants.name: A Persistent Buzzing
variants.restrictionsText: A random number of Giant Flies spawn with every enemy wave These extra monsters do not drop gold

variants.name: Beast Mode
variants.restrictionsText: Your heroes do three times more damage, but attack a third as often

variants.name: Low Initiative
variants.restrictionsText: Your heroes attack half as often and enemies move twice as fast

variants.name: March of the Undead
variants.restrictionsText: Relentless Undead monsters spawn and attack your formation When they are killed, they don't disappear. Instead, after 5 seconds, they get back up and resume their relentless attack

variants.name: Friend of Nature
variants.restrictionsText:
In addition to the core 12 Champions, you may only use Ranger, Druid, and/or Barbarian Champions.
Friendly animals take up slots in your formation. You start out with one slot taken up by a friendly animal, then every 50 areas a new animal joins your team, until there are 6 animals.

variants.name: No Time To Rest
variants.restrictionsText: Monsters spawn continuously (timer between spawns reduced to 1 second), but drop a quarter of the gold they normally do

variants.name: Invisible Shadows
variants.restrictionsText: Shadow monsters attack your formation randomly. Shadows are invisble and cannot be damaged until they reach you, then they are revealed and can take damage. Shadows move quickly and don't block spawns.

variants.name: Waves of Evil
variants.restrictionsText:
In addition to the core 12 Champions, you may only use Evil Champions.
All monsters emanate waves of shadowy evil upon spawning and every 5 seconds after that. Each wave deals 10% max health damage against a random Champion.

variants.name: The Crumbling Temple
variants.restrictionsText: Bits of crumbling temple fall on your Champions every 8-10 seconds, dealing 40% damage to a random Champion

variants.name: The Death Curse
variants.restrictionsText: Every time a Champion is killed, their DPS is permanently reduced by 25% for the duration of the adventure (stacks multiplicatively)

gameChanges.description: Permenantly decreases $target's damage by $growth_amount% every time they die (multiplicative). Current debuff: $total% for $champ_deaths
gameChanges.name: Death Curse

variants.name: Treasure Hunters
variants.restrictionsText: Two slots are taken up by treasure hunters The treasure hunters steal gold, reducing your gold find rate by 99% The treasure hunters also nab 50% of the quest items that drop, just to be annoying

variants.name: Useless Allies
variants.restrictionsText: Three useless adventurers join your party, taking up 3 formation slots Useless adventurers change slots every 25 areas

variants.name: Premature Betrayal
variants.restrictionsText: Various Red Wizard of Thay enemies attack, each with a unique and annoying ability.

variants.name: Cramped Quarters
variants.restrictionsText: Only dwarves, gnomes, kobolds, halflings, and goblins can be used

variants.name: Flying Monkey Skulls of Doom
variants.restrictionsText: A random number of Flying Monkeys spawn with each wave and toss monkey skulls at your formation. These extra monsters do not drop gold

variants.name: Crowded Streets
variants.restrictionsText: Slots in the formation are taken up by random citizens The slots change every 25 areas

variants.name: Patience is Key
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or more can be used

variants.name: Dinosaur Racing
variants.restrictionsText: Complete area 50 (and complete the adventure) within 30 minutes of starting the objective You've gotta go fast!

variants.name: Market Fluctuations
variants.restrictionsText: Leveling up your champions costs more than normal

variants.name: Relay Race
variants.restrictionsText: Each Champion can only be used to beat 150 unique areas A Champion counts as being "used" in an area if they're in the formation at any time during the attempt that beats an area for the first time After a Champion has been used while beating 150 unique areas, they can not be used in the formation anymore

variants.name: Close Escort
variants.restrictionsText: Starting in area 11, and every 50 areas thereafter up to area 261, one more slot is taken up by a caravan wagon.

variants.name: Constant Banditry
variants.restrictionsText: Additional bandits spawn with each wave of enemies. These extra monsters do not drop gold

variants.name: The Long Haul
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with 14 or more Strength can be used

variants.name: Lost in the Deep
variants.restrictionsText: Every 25 areas another bench seat is "lost" and unavailable for use

variants.name: Easily Distracted
variants.restrictionsText: Every 15 seconds a random Champion gets distracted and has their DPS disabled for 30 seconds

variants.name: Rude Welcome
variants.restrictionsText: Additional citizen "monsters" attack with each wave of enemies. The Butcher is immune to melee attacks. The Baker is immune to ranged and magic attacks. The Candlestick Maker stuns random champions. These extra monsters do not drop gold

variants.name: Overdue Rendezvous
variants.restrictionsText: Drizzt takes up a slot in your formation.

variants.name: Durable Deep
variants.restrictionsText: Monsters now have armored hit-based health instead of normal health

variants.name: Expert Opinion
variants.restrictionsText: An "expert" takes up a slot in the formation and debuffs the damage of all adjacent Champions

variants.name: The Haunted Jungle
variants.restrictionsText: Specters appears at random, slowly moving towards your formation If a specter reaches your formation it instantly kills your front-most Champion and disappears

variants.name: Poor Guidance
variants.restrictionsText: Your normal jungle guide is unavailable. Instead, an ill-informed guide takes up the formation's central slot. Every 10 seconds, the ill-informed guide disables the damage of a random Champion for 20 seconds.

variants.name: Overwhelming Force
variants.restrictionsText: All enemies deal 50% more damage and move 20% faster for each enemy alive

gameChanges.name: Increased Damage
gameChanges.desc: Enemies deal 50% more damage for each enemy alive

gameChanges.name: Increased Speed
gameChanges.desc: Enemies move 20% faster for each enemy alive

variants.name: Pros and CONs
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher may be used

variants.name: Upholding the Law
variants.restrictionsText: Only Lawful Champions may be used

variants.name: Starving in the Jungle
variants.restrictionsText: Gold drops are reduced by 2% in each area, stacking multiplicatively. Your Champions take 4% unavoidable damage every second in non-boss areas.

gameChanges.name: Starving
gameChanges.desc: Every area, your gold find is reduced by 2% (multiplicative)

variants.name: Wet Feet
variants.restrictionsText: Champions have a random chance, on attack, to step in the swamp getting "wet feet," which reduces their attack speed by 50% for 3 attacks

variants.name: Hatchlings Underfoot
variants.restrictionsText: Spider hatchlings spawn with every wave. These additional monsters drop no gold. If they reach the formation they get stepped on, killing the spider but dealing poison damage to the Champion who stepped on them.

variants.name: Don't Look Up!
variants.restrictionsText: At random a spider drops down from a web above a formation slot, poisoning the Champion in that slot, reducing their damage by 99% for 15 seconds.

variants.name: Heavy Burden
variants.restrictionsText: The supplies you are carrying are heavy. Every 30 seconds 3 heavy packages are randomly assigned to Champions in your formation. Champions carrying a heavy package are stunned for the duration.

variants.name: On the Hunt
variants.restrictionsText: Every 50 areas a slot is taken up by a hunter, who attacks with a bow dealing a percentage of your formation's DPS.

variants.name: Friends of the Forest
variants.restrictionsText: An assortment of deadly forest animals attack your formation, each with their own annoying abilities.

variants.name: Anti-Dexterous Explorers
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a DEX score of 14 or lower can be used

variants.name: Struggling Toward Omu
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a CHA score of 13 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Wagon Train
variants.restrictionsText: A wagon takes up a slot in the formation. Every 100 areas an additional wagon joins your train, taking up another slot.

variants.name: Not Very Charming
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a CHA score of 14 or lower can be used

variants.name: Lobsterfolk Assault
variants.restrictionsText: Aldani spawn randomly with each wave. These extra enemies don't drop gold.

variants.name: Taking Responsibility
variants.restrictionsText: Asharra starts out in your formation and can not be removed or swapped out. Only Asharra and Champions with Asharra's chosen bond can deal damage.

variants.name: Periodic Petrification
variants.restrictionsText: Every 15 seconds a random Champion is petrified for up to 60 seconds Killing a monster reduces the stun time for all currently petrified champions by 5 seconds

variants.name: No Good at All
variants.restrictionsText: Only neutral and evil Champions can be used. No good allowed.

variants.name: Fall From Grace
variants.restrictionsText: Every 15 seconds, your Champion with the highest damage has their damage reduced by 99.99% for 60 seconds. This effect can stack.

variants.name: Home Field Advantage
variants.restrictionsText: All yuan-ti enemies power up each second they're alive, gaining health and damage

variants.name: Double Vision
variants.restrictionsText: All spawns are doubled, including bosses Duplicated enemies drop no gold and don't count towards quest progress

variants.name: Underground Railroad
variants.restrictionsText: Three slots in the formation are taken up by various slaves from the prisoner pits.

variants.name: Street War
variants.restrictionsText: Whenever you kill Zhentarim or Xanathar mercenaries, the other faction's minions get stronger

buff_details.desc: Increases the health of Zhentarim enemies. When Xanathar enemies are killed, this buff goes up by 10%
buff_details.name: Street Wars: Zhentarim

buff_details.desc: Increases the health of Xanathar enemies. When Zhentarim enemies are killed, this buff goes up by 10%
buff_details.name: Street Wars: Xanathar

variants.name: Force Grey Unleashed
variants.restrictionsText: Only members of Force Grey are usable on this adventure. You start with Calliope unlocked and in formation. The support of Waterdeep provides Champions with a small DPS boost in each area.

variants.name: Vajra's Guards
variants.restrictionsText: Vajra has asked that 3 Stone Golems accompany you on your adventures. I'm sure she's not monitoring them at every moment.

variants.name: Wisdom Check
variants.restrictionsText: Champions base damage is modified by their Wisdom modifier

variants.name: Sleuth It Out
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with an INT score of 12 or higher can partake in this adventure

variants.name: The Newcomers of Notoriety
variants.restrictionsText: Baeloth thought it would be fun to split the party, allowing the newcomers to enjoy his illusions! You can only use Event Champions in this adventure. No core or evergreen champions allowed. Fancy red pandas in top hats riding unicycles attack with each wave of enemies. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. The fancy red pandas deal 400% additional damage. Watch out!

variants.name: Never Split the Party
variants.restrictionsText: Only one Champion from each bench seat is available. The Champion is chosen at random and changes every 25 areas.

variants.name: Azaka's Procession - Part 1
variants.restrictionsText: Azaka's body takes up a slot in your formation, starting in area 11.

variants.name: Snakes on our Plane
variants.restrictionsText: Whenever a Champion is damaged by a Yuan-ti they are transformed into a flying snake for 30 seconds. Additional Yan-ti Malisons spawn in every area and move 200% faster.

variants.name: The Soulmonger Calls
variants.restrictionsText: Champions start at, and cannot be healed above, 50% of their max health Whenever a Champion dies their soul is sucked into the Soulmonger and they become unavailable for the remainder of the adventure

variants.name: Azaka's Procession - Part 2
variants.restrictionsText: Azaka's body takes up a slot in your formation.

variants.name: Acererak's Puzzle
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with STR of 13 or higher, a DEX of 14 or higher, AND a CON of 15 or higher can be used.

variants.name: The Hunt for Owl-y
variants.restrictionsText: Two Harpell wizards take up slots in the formation. They change slots every 25 areas.

variants.name: Werewolves in the Mist
variants.restrictionsText: Extremely powerful werewolves spawn randomly. These extra enemies drop more gold, but have much more health and damage. Lycanthrope Champions do four times damage to these extra enemies.

variants.name: We're not in Faerûn Anymore
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with melee or ranged base attacks can be used. Each area a group of three armored Flameskulls spawns and attacks your formation with powerful stunning attacks.

variants.name: Haunted Fortunes
variants.restrictionsText: Every 25 areas a different one of Madame Eva's fortunes haunts the champions.

by_area.name: Current Fortune
by_area.desc2: A raven takes up the center spot of your formation

by_area.name: Current Fortune
by_area.desc2: 1-3 Gargoyles spawn with each wave: they give no Gold or Quest progress

by_area.name: Current Fortune
by_area.desc2: Monsters only drop 1% of normal Gold drops

by_area.name: Current Fortune
by_area.desc2: Champions do 2x damage, but enemies do 4x damage

by_area.name: Current Fortune
by_area.desc2: Half of your normal attacks miss and do 0 damage

variants.name: Poor Fortune
variants.restrictionsText: For every 5 gold pick-ups collected, champions deal 5% less damage and gold find is reduced by 5%. These stacks halve when you change areas or completely kill all enemies on the screen.

gameChanges.name: Poor Fortune
gameChanges.desc: For every 5 gold pick-ups collected, champions deal 5% less damage and gold find is reduced by 5%.

variants.name: Relentless Misfortune
variants.restrictionsText: Relentless Undead monsters spawn and attack your formation When they are killed, they don't disappear. Instead, after 3 seconds, they get back up and resume their relentless attack

variants.name: Chatty Nobles
variants.restrictionsText: Chatty nobles keep most of your Champions occupied, so only Champions with a CHA score of 14 or higher can get away from the party to take part in the adventure

variants.name: Modron Assistance
variants.restrictionsText: Nordom the Modron takes up a slot in your formation. Nordom's Modron nature reminds humanoid Waterdhavian enemies of the Modron March, inspiring them to fight even harder (and thus do 4x more damage).

variants.name: Thine Bounty is Mine!
variants.restrictionsText: Cinnamon joins the formation. A drunken sailor is convinced that Cinnamon is the perfect pet for her ship, and she must have them! The sailor boss spawns in every area after 10 enemies with one of four special abilities. If Briv is in your formation, Champions' normal attack cooldowns are decreased by .5 seconds.

variants.name: Haaave You Met Asmodeus?
variants.restrictionsText: Two Cultists of Asmodeus take up slots in the formation Xanathar and Zhenatrim foes are upset that you have "aligned" yourself with the cult and deal 4x damage and have 4x health

variants.name: Domesticated Owlbears
variants.restrictionsText: Crazed Owlbears attack the formation, stunning a random Champion with their wonderous spectacle!

variants.name: This Quest Stinks!
variants.restrictionsText: Two skunks accompany the formation, but don't worry: Volo vouched for them! Champions adjacent to a skunk deal no damage, but their formation abilities are active. Black Dragon Wyrmlings appear in each area. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Hold for the Red Wizards
variants.restrictionsText: A tough Red Wizard attacks the formation in each area. While the Red Wizard is alive, a random formation slot is stunned.

variants.name: Form Ranks
variants.restrictionsText: No male Champions can be used in the front-most and third columns. No female Champions can be used in the second and fourth columns.

variants.name: Drop of Time
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. Enemies heal 10% of their HP every 2 seconds. Only Champions who are 75 years old or older can be used.

variants.name: They Who Smelt It
variants.restrictionsText: A skunk takes up a slot and causes the adjacent slots to deal much less damage.

variants.name: Distribute Your Weight
variants.restrictionsText: Champions are stunned for as long as they are next to more than 2 Champions.

variants.name: Mongrelfolk Incursion
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. Mongrelfolk from Barovia have infiltrated the mine in an attempt to turn the dragon to the side of Strahd! They appear in each area. Bosses deal 100% additional damage. Only Champions with CHA of 15 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Only the Strong Survive
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a STR score of 12 or higher may be used.

variants.name: Shorty's Day Off
variants.restrictionsText: There's a convention for short races going on in Waterdeep. No dwarves, gnomes, halflings, kobolds, or goblins can be used.

variants.name: Intelligence Hunt
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher may be used.

variants.name: Visions of Strahd
variants.restrictionsText: Only the first 9 original Champions are allowed. Strahd taunts your Champions throughout the adventure with unique dialog.

variants.name: Seeds of Corruption
variants.restrictionsText: Every 25 enemy kills, a random Champion is cursed with a Seed of Corruption for 30 seconds. Corrupted Champions have their attacks disabled.

variants.name: The Strahd Squad
variants.restrictionsText: There is a 40% chance with each wave that 5 additional Strahd Zombies appear. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Due to Strahd's influence, Champion healing is reduced by 75%

variants.name: The Gargoyle's Apprentice
variants.restrictionsText: Awakened cleaning supplies randomly attack. These extra enemies drop no gold.

variants.name: House of Darkness
variants.restrictionsText: It's dark. Enemies attack from the darkness very quickly. When enemies emerges from the darkness, a random Champion is frightened, increasing their attack cooldown by 2 seconds for 10 seconds.

variants.name: Home Not So Alone
variants.restrictionsText: Each boss fight, a Blockade and a Goblin appear. The boss is invulnerable until the Blockade and Goblin are taken out. Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

variants.name: The Trepidatious Trio
variants.restrictionsText: Nat, Squiddly, and Jenks take up slots in your formation.

variants.name: Our Time To Shine
variants.restrictionsText: Champions from the "C" Team, Wafflecrew, Companions of the Hall, Heroes of Baldur's Gate, and Force Grey can NOT be used.

variants.name: Review by the Blackstaff
variants.restrictionsText: Vajra joins the formation to advise (slot 8). Champions with Melee and Ranged attacks deal no damage.

variants.name: Think Your Way Out Of It
variants.restrictionsText: Only champions with an INT score of 13 or higher can partake.

variants.name: Air's Getting Pretty Thin
variants.restrictionsText: Champions' damage is decreased as they climb higher up the temple, based on their CON score (see debuff icon in-game for more details).

by_area.name: Air's Getting Pretty Thin
by_area.desc2: Once past the temple, Champions' damage is decreased based on their CON score and the height they've reached. Those with CON below 18 will lose more damage the higher they go.

by_area.name: Air's Getting Pretty Thin
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is decreased based on their CON score and the height they've reached. Those with CON below 18 will lose more damage the higher they go.

by_area.name: Air's Getting Pretty Thin
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is decreased based on their CON score and the height they've reached. Those with CON below 18 will lose more damage the higher they go.

by_area.name: Air's Getting Pretty Thin
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is decreased based on their CON score and the height they've reached. Those with CON below 18 will lose more damage the higher they go.

by_area.name: Air's Getting Pretty Thin
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is decreased based on their CON score and the height they've reached. Those with CON below 18 will lose more damage the higher they go.

variants.name: Red Wizard 'Escort'
variants.restrictionsText: Bubbles brought us a friend from the future! Wait, is that right? Rath Modar, the infamous Red Wizard, joins the formation to learn of the fall of his Red Wizards in Chult. Don't worry, Bubbles vouched for him. Two additional Red Wizards spawn with each wave. All Red Wizards each have 4 armored HP that must be cleared before they are defeated. Only Champions with INT of 12 or lower can be used.

gameChanges.name: Rath Modar, the infamous Red Wizard

variants.name: A Saurial's Lament
variants.restrictionsText: Dragonbait takes up a slot in the formation and mourns the loss of his friend, Artus. Every 10 areas Dragonbait's scent changes, empowering the enemies or debuffing the champions.

by_area.name: Dragonbait's Scent
by_area.desc2: Enemies deal 100% more damage

by_area.name: Dragonbait's Scent
by_area.desc2: Enemies have 100% more health

by_area.name: Dragonbait's Scent
by_area.desc2: Champions deal 99% less damage

by_area.name: Dragonbait's Scent
by_area.desc2: Enemies drop 99% less gold

by_area.name: Dragonbait's Scent
by_area.desc2: Enemies have 300% more health and deal 300% more damage

variants.name: A Saurial's Resolve
variants.restrictionsText: Dragonbait once again accompanies your formation, taking up the front slot. He does not attack, but provides a buff to the party while alive. Valindra Shadowmantle resurrects once per boss fight for every 50 areas into the adventure you are. Each time she resurrects she greatly increases her damage and health. Each time Valindra ressurects, Dragonbait's resolve grows stronger, increasing his health, damage reduction, and the buff he provides.

by_area.name: A Saurial's Resolve
by_area.desc: Dragonbait gains more resolve, increasing his health, decreasing his damage taken, and increasing the formation's damage.

by_area.name: A Saurial's Resolve
by_area.desc: Dragonbait gains more resolve, increasing his health, decreasing his damage taken, and increasing the formation's damage.

variants.name: Spirit of the Trickster Gods
variants.restrictionsText: Bubbles joins the formation and brings the spirit of the trickster gods with her! That's good, right?! Various trickster gods affect the formation throughout the adventure, granting a boon or a bane to the formation. The trickster god rotates every 5 areas.

by_area.name: I'jin
by_area.desc2: The Champions in the second column of the formation have their normal attack cooldown increased by 2 seconds.

by_area.name: Kubazan
by_area.desc2: Champions deal 100% additional damage.

by_area.name: Moa
by_area.desc2: Good Champions deal 400% additional damage.

by_area.name: Nangnang
by_area.desc2: Enemies drop 99% less gold.

by_area.name: Obo'laka
by_area.desc2: The Champions in the third column of the formation cannot damage enemies.

by_area.name: Papazotl
by_area.desc2: Enemies move 200% faster and deal 100% additional damage.

by_area.name: Shagambi
by_area.desc2: Evil Champions cannot damage enemies.

by_area.name: Unkh
by_area.desc2: Neutral Champions cannot damage enemies.

by_area.name: Wongo
by_area.desc2: When a non-boss enemy is killed, it respawns after 5 seconds.

variants.name: The Killer Mists
variants.restrictionsText: All Champions take damage over time based on their CON score while in misty/snowing areas. The higher the CON score, the lower the relative damage.

variants.name: Class Vacation
variants.restrictionsText: There's a conference in Baldur's Gate for certain classes. Bards, Barbarians, Clerics, and Druids can not be used.

variants.name: A Nod from Strahd
variants.restrictionsText: In each boss area Strahd on Horseback appears. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. When defeated, he runs off the screen. Only champions with INT of 13 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Diversity Day-Trip
variants.restrictionsText: Only one of each species is allowed in your formation at a time.

variants.name: Late Game
variants.restrictionsText: Champions in seats 1-4 are unavailable (Bruenor through Jarlaxle's seats). Only Champions in seats 5 or higher (Calliope or higher) can be used.

variants.name: Shadowfell Stalwarts
variants.restrictionsText: Each wave spawns 1-3 shadar-kai warriors. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Each boss area spawns 1 Shadar-Kai Soul Monger, a boss with 20 hits-based HP. When the Soul Monger hits a Champion with a melee attack, that Champion is defeated. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. Fog encroaches in each area.

variants.name: Nimblest Escape
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a DEX score of 14 or higher may be used.

variants.name: Stumbling Escape
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a DEX score of 13 or lower may be used.

variants.name: Distracted Escape
variants.restrictionsText: Champions adjacent to Mirt deal no damage due to his distracting presence. Only good and evil Champions may be used. At the start of each area, an Iron Defender with 10 armored HP appears. Other monsters are invulnerable while the Iron Defender is there.

variants.name: From The Shadows
variants.restrictionsText: Since you're on the run you must be discreet and attack from the shadows. Only Champions whose base attack is ranged or magic can be used.

variants.name: Spined Nuisances
variants.restrictionsText: Super powered Spined Devils appear at random and attack the party These devilish foes come with a variety of annoying abilities

variants.name: Twilight Twist
variants.restrictionsText: Two Shadar-Kai warriors join the formation. Champions next to the Shadar-Kai are so filled with existential angst that their base attack cooldown speed is doubled. Orcus has sent his minions to slow you down. 1-3 Relentless Ghouls appear with every wave. When they are killed, Relentless Ghouls don't disappear. Instead, after 5 seconds, they get back up and start attacking again. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Screams of the Dead
variants.restrictionsText: On boss areas, a former boss appears with the active boss, causing you to fight through your fears and regrets.

variants.name: Frantic Excavation
variants.restrictionsText: Monsters move twice as fast. Only Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or lower can be used.

variants.name: Birds of a Feather
variants.restrictionsText: One raven fills the formation in slot 8. When a Champion is knocked out, they don't recover until after defeating a new boss area.

variants.name: Guests of the Groom
variants.restrictionsText: Barovian wedding "guests" have filled the castle in preparation of Strahds nuptials. Two of them take up space in the formation, causing each of the Champions to randomly do between 0.1% and 199.9% of their actual damage with each hit.

variants.name: Careful Consideration
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Tanking Expectations
variants.restrictionsText:
A random Tanking Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, and can't be moved.
Other Champions with the Tanking role cannot be used. 
Enemies move 300% faster, have 300% more health, and deal 300% more damage.

variants.name: Bazaar Exploits
variants.restrictionsText: Two goblins accompany your party. They each take up a formation slot and change locations every 25 areas. Xanathar Guild enemies take additional damage.

variants.name: Flame(skull) War
variants.restrictionsText: All gold found is reduced by 99%. Trenzia's Flameskull spawns in each area, and has her damage increased by 200%.

variants.name: Servants of the Demon Prince
variants.restrictionsText: In Non-Boss levels, each wave creates an extra 1-3 random undead. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress. In Boss levels, an additional random boss must also be defeated to advance. Only Champions with INT of 14 or higher may be used.

variants.name: Elder Rune Madness
variants.restrictionsText: Each time you encounter the portal in area 25 (and repeats of area 25 in 75, 125, 175, etc.) you are affected by a different elder rune, debuffing the party in some way for the next 50 areas. See the buffs area in the top-right corner of the game for further details on each debuff.

by_area.name: Elder Rune Madness
by_area.desc2: Whenever an enemy spawns, a random Champion takes 20% of their max HP as damage.

by_area.name: Elder Rune Madness
by_area.desc2: Each area a random formation slot is debuffed. Any Champion in that formation slot is stunned. The effect lasts until you change areas.

by_area.name: Elder Rune Madness
by_area.desc2: Monsters drop 90% less gold.

by_area.name: Elder Rune Madness
by_area.desc2: Champions cannot regain hit points or gain shields.

variants.name: The Madness Grows
variants.restrictionsText: All Champions in the even seats have disappeared. They probably abandoned you. Or maybe they are the sounds you hear from the shadows?

variants.name: The Madness Peaks
variants.restrictionsText:
All champions in the odd seats have disappeared. They're all out to get you.
Each wave spawns a Hallucination with 5 armored hits. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Bullywugs in the Bog
variants.restrictionsText: Two bullywugs take up slots in the formation

variants.name: Modrons in the Mud
variants.restrictionsText: A Monodrone and a Duodrone take up slots in the formation. They're interesting, but they don't do much else. Only Champions with CHA of 14 or lower can be used.

variants.name: And a Pixie in a Pear Treant
variants.restrictionsText:
A Pixie in a Pear Treant joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation, but don't do much else.
Only Champions with a CON of 12 or lower can be used.

variants.name: An Abyssal Situation
variants.restrictionsText: Armored abyssal chickens spawn in each area These chickens drop no gold and do not count towards quest progress Every 10 areas the number of abyssal chickens that spawn in each area increases by 1

variants.name: Dino Nightmare
variants.restrictionsText: Illusory dinosaurs spawn in each area. They drop no gold nor do they count towards quest progress. Champion's base attack cooldown is increased by 100%. Asharra, Azaka, Birdsong, and Jamilah each deal 400% more damage and are not affected by the base attack cooldown change.

variants.name: A Familiar Friend
variants.restrictionsText: Moogin the Swarm of Quippers joins the formation. Only Champions next to Moogin can deal damage with normal attacks. This does not affect Ultimate attacks. Enemies have +4000% health, but take an additional 10% damage each time they take damage, applied multiplicably, up to a max of 40 stacks.

variants.name: A Tale of Two Fiends
variants.restrictionsText: Two fiends take up slots in the formation. Fiend enemies move quicker and deal more damage to your party.

variants.name: A Tale of Two Champions
variants.restrictionsText: You can only field two Champions at a time.

variants.name: A Tale of Two Years
variants.restrictionsText: Only Event Champions from Year Two can be used.

variants.name: Slow and Steady
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or higher can be used.

variants.name: A Hero's Entourage
variants.restrictionsText: Minsc starts out in the formation and can not be removed or swapped out. Champions can only be placed adjacent to Minsc. When Minsc is moved, any Champions that are not adjacent to him after the move will be removed from the formation.

variants.name: Sneak Attack
variants.restrictionsText: Pest the Gremishka joins the formation. You can't use Champions with the speed role. When you enter a new area, the area requirements are reduced by 5% for each Champion with a Dexterity score of 15 or higher, stacking additively

variants.name: Dreams of Beholders
variants.restrictionsText: A Death Kiss takes up a slot in the formation and drains the Champions' health over time. Champions with a higher CON score take less damage from the Death Kiss.

gameChanges.name: Death Kiss
gameChanges.desc2: The Death Kiss escorting your formation drains blood from all Champions every second. It deals a percentage of the Champions' max health as damage based on their CON Score.|- Con 12 or lower: 3% of max health as damage per second.|- Con 13-15 : 2% of max health as damage per second. |- Con 16+: 1% of max health as damage per second.

variants.name: Feigned Weakness
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a STR score of 13 or lower can be used.

variants.name: DPS in the Deeps
variants.restrictionsText:
A random DPS Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, but can be moved.
Other Champions with the DPS role cannot be used.

variants.name: Bregan D'aerthe Comes to Call
variants.restrictionsText: Jarlaxle starts in the formation and can not be moved or removed. Two Bregan D'aerthe mercenaries take up slots and attack with pistols. Enemies hit by the pistols move faster and hit harder.

gameChanges.name: Bregan D'aerthe Pistols
gameChanges.desc2: Enemies that have been attacked by the pistols (marked with the pistol overlay) increase their speed by 50% and deal 3x their base damage as they are frantic to figure out what these new smokepowder weapons are.

variants.name: Sober Up
variants.restrictionsText: Blurry Pink Elephants attack the formation at random in non-boss areas. Each time a Pink Elephant spawns, all Champions gain a stack of "drunken haze", reduced their damage by 10%, stacking multiplicatively. For every 15 minutes that passes the number of stacks each Champion has is reduced by 25%. Using bounty contracts also decreases the stack size as if the time in the contract had passed.

variants.name: In The Beginning
variants.restrictionsText: Only Event Champions from Year One can be used.

variants.name: Veteran Brigade
variants.restrictionsText: Only evergreen Champions can be used. From area 23 onward, Jot, the quasit joins the party in slot 4. All bosses have 50 points of armored health.

variants.name: Social Grace
variants.restrictionsText: Only evergreen Champions can be used. Only Champions with CHA of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Evergreens with an Evergreen
variants.restrictionsText: Only Evergreen Champions can be used on this adventure. An Evergreen Treant joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation and throw giant rocks at the enemies dealing 1 second of BUD damage per hit.

variants.name: She's Harmless!
variants.restrictionsText: Only event Champions can be used. From area 21 onward, Meepo the kobold joins your party in the back of the formation. Champions' damage is reduced by 25% (additively) for each 'good' Champion in the formation.

variants.name: The Tallest of Kobolds
variants.restrictionsText: Only event Champions can be used. Three Kobolds in a trench coat join the party. Enemies deal 200% more damage. Kobold and Goblin Champions deal 400% more damage.

variants.name: Calcryx Tricks
variants.restrictionsText:
Only event Champions can be used.
Meepo's "pet" dragon Calcryx joins the formation.
Champions next to Calcryx start each area at 25% of their max health due to her "help".
Champions' damage is reduced by 25% (additively) for each champion in the formation that is not a kobold or a goblin.

variants.name: Troublesome Prisoner
variants.restrictionsText: Amrik Vanthampur accompanies your formation but does not attack. Champions adjacent to Amrik deal no damage when they attack, but still provide their formation bonuses.

variants.name: Dark Doppelgangers
variants.restrictionsText: Every boss area, a Doppelganger disguised as one of your Champions attacks! You must defeat the Doppelganger to advance.

variants.name: Faerûn's Most Wanted
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use the Champions in the top 30% of current time gate popularity. Evergreen Champions can not be used.

variants.name: Cold & Wet
variants.restrictionsText: Two members of the Flaming Fist escort the Champions to Candlekeep, changing slots every 25 areas. In areas where it is raining, Champions' damage is reduced by 99% and enemies drop 99% less gold.

by_area.name: Cold & Wet
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is reduced by 99% and enemies drop 99% less gold.

by_area.name: Cold & Wet
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is reduced by 99% and enemies drop 99% less gold.

by_area.name: Cold & Wet
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is reduced by 99% and enemies drop 99% less gold.

by_area.name: Cold & Wet
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is reduced by 99% and enemies drop 99% less gold.

by_area.name: Cold & Wet
by_area.desc2: Champions' damage is reduced by 99% and enemies drop 99% less gold.

variants.name: Madcap Adventures
variants.restrictionsText: Madcaps arrive in each area. If a Madcap hits a Champion, a Bloodspawned Madcap immediately spawns. The Bloodspawned Madcaps do not drop gold or count towards quest progress. Each time a Madcap is Bloodspawned, Champion damage is reduced by 99% for 3 seconds.

variants.name: Faerûn's Most Neglected
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use the Champions in the bottom 30% of current time gate popularity.
Evergreen Champions can not be used.

variants.name: Vault of Pixies
variants.restrictionsText: Vajra has sent some of her pixies to assist in your upcoming battle against the Xanathar. Unfortunately, the pixies misunderstood Vajras orders; they attack you instead. Pixies cause Champions they attack to sleep for 5 seconds. Additionally, only Champions with a CHA score of 14 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Vault of Poison
variants.restrictionsText: Anyone hit by a Zhentarim Spy is poisoned for the next 2 minutes. The Zhents will now appear in each area. While poisoned, Champions lose a percentage of their max health every second based on their CON score. Champions with CON 14 or lower lose 20% of their max health every second. Champions with CON 15+ lose only 5% of their max health every second.

variants.name: Vault of Cuteness
variants.restrictionsText: Marvel the Imp joins the formation. Champions next to Marvel have their normal attack cooldown increased by 5 seconds due to the cuteness overload. 1-2 adorably cute enemies from The Sketching Hour with 5 armored hit points each join in with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

variants.name: On The Job Learning
variants.restrictionsText: Chadwick accompanies the Champions, taking up a slot in the formation. Chadwick does not like working with other spellcasters, so only Champions with a melee or ranged base attack can be used.

variants.name: Strike!
variants.restrictionsText: Champions with the Gold Find tag cannot be used. Enemies drop 99% less gold.

variants.name: Take Five
variants.restrictionsText: Only Event Champions from Year Five can be used

variants.name: Batiri in the Goblin Halls
variants.restrictionsText: A Batiri Goblin Stack arrives in each area. The Batiri Goblin Stack drops no gold and do not count towards quest progress. Only Champions with an INT score of 12 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Temporal Rift in the Goblin Halls
variants.restrictionsText: Time is sped up by 2x. You must complete area 100 within 30 minutes of starting the objective. You must click on 50 distractions before completing the objective.

variants.name: Goblin Halls: the Next Generation
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use champions that are 25 years old or younger.

variants.name: The Nimble Grove
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with a DEX score of 14 or higher may be used.

variants.name: The Misty Grove
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. The mists of Ravenloft have invaded the Twilight Grove, infusing the entire area with an unnatural charm. Champion damage is reduced by 99% Only Champions with a DEX of 16 or higher can be used.

variants.name: The Overgrown Grove
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Dexterity of 17 or higher.
Plant creatures deal +400% damage and move +200% faster.
1-2 Twig Blights spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Everything is Awful
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with CON of 15+ can be used. To keep up their strength, Celeste urges the Champions to eat or drink, but everything in Avernus tastes horrible. The Champions' food and drink is afflicted by a different demoralizing trait every 5 areas.

by_area.name: Everything is Awful
by_area.desc2: The Base Attack Cooldown of all Champions is doubled.

by_area.name: Everything is Awful
by_area.desc2: Enemies move 20% faster and deal 200% more damage.

by_area.name: Everything is Awful
by_area.desc2: Champions collect 99% less gold.

variants.name: Earthquake!
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with Dex 14 or higher can be used. An earthquake occurs every 20-120 seconds. Earthquakes cause a screenshake and cause falling pieces of the city hit the Champions, dealing damage equal to 75% of their max health (subject to a DEX save). The earthquake also triggers the following effects to occur for 15 seconds: - All Champion damage is disabled - Enemies speed increased by 200% - Enemies deal 400% more damage.

buff_box.name: Earthquake!
buff_box.description: For each point their Dexterity score is above 10, a Champion has a 10% chance to save against the damage from the Earthquake!

variants.name: Hailstorm!
variants.restrictionsText:
You can only use Champions that have STR as their highest ability score, including ties.
Every 5 seconds, a large Hailstone falls from the sky striking a random Champion, dealing damage equal to 50% of the Champion's max health.

variants.name: All You Know Is Wrong
variants.restrictionsText: Whenever a non-boss creature dies, there is a chance they immediately respawn as a Relentless Ghoul. That chance is equal to 10% * the current number of monsters. When Relentless Ghouls are killed, they don't disappear. Instead, after 5 seconds, they get back up and resume their relentless attack.

variants.name: Shadow Stalkers
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with CHA of 12 or lower can be used. Lemures appear in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count toward quest progress. Enemies deal 300% more damage.

variants.name: Avernus Frozen Over
variants.restrictionsText:
1-3 White Abishai spawn randomly with each wave.They don't drop gold, nor do they count toward quest progress.
Each Boss wave spawns an Ice Devil as an additional Boss. It must also be defeated to progress.
You can't use Champions that have WIS as their lowest ability score, including ties.
The weather is snowing in every area.

variants.name: Twice More Into The Breach
variants.restrictionsText: Each boss needs to be defeated twice to advance. Only Champions with WIS of 12 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Thrice More Into The Breach
variants.restrictionsText: Each boss needs to be defeated three times to advance. Only Champions with WIS of 10 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Nightmare Mode
variants.restrictionsText: Each boss needs to be defeated four times to advance. Only Champions with WIS of 8 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Displaced Anger
variants.restrictionsText: Wyllow's Displacer Beast companion Crissann arrives at every boss level, intent on stopping us from destroying Wyllowwood. The Displacer Beast is tough to hit. When it first spawns, each attack has a 1% chance of hitting. With each attack, your team gets better at finding the Displacer Beast's true location.

by_area.name: Displacer Beast
by_area.desc: The Displacer Beast is tough to hit. When it first spawns, each attack has a small chance of hitting. With each attack, your team gets better at finding the Displacer Beast's true location.

variants.name: Ettercap Swarm
variants.restrictionsText: Ettercaps attack in each area intent on slowing your progress through Wyllowwood. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Ettercaps attack champions at random. Each time an ettercap hits a champion, the champion is stunned for 1 second plus 1 second for each time they have been hit by an Ettercap in the current area.

variants.name: Smooth Talkers
variants.restrictionsText: You can only use Champions that have CHA as their highest ability score, including ties.

variants.name: An Illithid Ambush
variants.restrictionsText: The Champions may think they are stealthy, but the groups that inhabit Seadeeps are ready for them! Each group is powered up in a different way. Their buffs/debuffs are active as long as you are on an area that has one or more of them included in it.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Mind Flayers and Githyankis
by_area.desc: While in this area, Gold Find is reduced by 99% and Enemies attack twice as fast.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Mind Flayers
by_area.desc: While in this area, Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Orcs
by_area.desc: While in this area, Enemies deal 300% more damage.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Quaggoths
by_area.desc: While in this area, Champions take ongoing damage equal to 5% of their max health every second.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Mind Flayers, Orcs, and Quaggoths
by_area.desc: While in this area, Gold Find is reduced by 99%, Enemies deal 300% more damage, and Champions take ongoing damage equal to 5% of their max health every second.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Quaggoths
by_area.desc: While in this area, Champions take ongoing damage equal to 5% of their max health every second.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Mind Flayers and Quaggoths
by_area.desc: While in this area, Gold Find is reduced by 99% and Champions take ongoing damage equal to 5% of their max health every second.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Mind Flayers
by_area.desc: While in this area, Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Mind Flayers
by_area.desc: While in this area, Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Grimlocks
by_area.desc: While in this area, Champions damage is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Orcs and Grimlocks
by_area.desc: While in this area, Enemies deal 300% more damage and Champions damage is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Grimlocks
by_area.desc: While in this area, Champions damage is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Grimlocks and Githyankis
by_area.desc: While in this area, Champions damage is reduced by 99% and Enemies attack twice as fast.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Orcs, Grimlocks, and Githyankis
by_area.desc: While in this area, Enemies deal 300% more damage, Champions damage is reduced by 99%, and Enemies attack twice as fast.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Grimlocks and Githyankis
by_area.desc: While in this area, Champions damage is reduced by 99% and Enemies attack twice as fast.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Orcs and Grimlocks
by_area.desc: While in this area, Enemies deal 300% more damage and Champions damage is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Mind Flayers and Grimlocks
by_area.desc: While in this area, Gold Find is reduced by 99% and Champions damage is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Orcs
by_area.desc: While in this area, Enemies deal 300% more damage.

by_area.name: Ambushed by Mind Flayers
by_area.desc: While in this area, Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

variants.name: Misty Undermountain
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. The mists of Ravenloft have invaded Undermountain, infusing the entire area with an unnatural charm. Only Human, Halflings, Elves, and Dwarves can be used. Champions that are damaged by Mind Flayer enemies are stunned for 5 seconds.

variants.name: An Owlbear of an Undertaking
variants.restrictionsText: A Snowy Owlbear joins the formation. Every 5 seconds, it takes a bite out of a random Champion next to it, dealing damage equal to 25% of the Champion's max health.

variants.name: Wait, What?
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with WIS 13 or lower AND INT 13 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Ireena von Zarovich
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. - Strahd has infiltrated Alterdeep and seeded a monster from our own nightmares! In each area of Alterdeep, a 5HP armored enemy arrives. This vampire version of Ireena Kolyana is out for blood! Whenever a Champion attacks Ireena von Zarovich, they gain a blood drain debuff. Champions with a blood drain debuff lose 5% of their max HP every second. Blood drain debuffs are removed when you change areas or kill Ireena.

buff_box.name: Ireena Blood Drain
buff_box.description: Whenever a Champion attacks Ireena Kolyana, they gain a blood drain debuff. |Champions with a blood drain debuff lose 5% of their max HP every second.|Blood drain debuffs are removed when you change areas or kill Ireena.

variants.name: Déjà Vu All Over Again
variants.restrictionsText:
Area requirements are doubled in non-boss areas.
Enemies spawn twice in all non-static boss levels. 
In all areas, each time a monster is defeated, all monsters deal +10% damage, gain +10% max health, and +10% speed, stacking additively. Stacks reset after going to a new area.

variants.name: A Difficult Descent
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with DEX and STR of 13 or higher can be used

variants.name: The Devil Arrives
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. Strahd arrives on horseback in each boss area. He is invulnerable until the area boss is defeated. Strahd must be defeated to advance. Only Champions with INT of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Hearts Aflame
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't use Champions that have CHA as their lowest ability score, including ties.
Every 10 seconds, two flaming hearts falls from the sky, striking two random Champions, dealing 25% of their total health in damage and stunning them for 10 seconds.

variants.name: Dream Gauntlet
variants.restrictionsText: Only Good and Neutral Champions can be used, no Evil Champions. Champions' health does not heal to full (nor are defeated Champions revived) when you advance areas. The only way to heal or revive defeated Champions is to go back one or more areas. If you go back one or more areas while in your highest area unlocked or the previous area, Enemy damage will be increased by 25% (multiplicatively).

variants.name: Zombie Dreams
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. Strahd Zombies appear in each area between 26-50. They do not count towards quest progress, nor do they drop gold. Each time you re-encounter an area, the number of Strahd Zombies increases!

variants.name: Look Out!
variants.restrictionsText:
A Pink Elephant joins the formation. Champions next to the Pink Elephant deal no damage.
You can only use Champions with a ranged basic attack.

variants.name: The Path of Redcaps
variants.restrictionsText: Three Redcaps appear randomly in each area. Redcaps track the number of enemies destroyed. For each enemy destroyed during this adventure, the damage of all Redcaps is increased by 10% additively.

effects.comment: this effect does nothing, just want a static effect for the info box.

buff_box.name: The Path Of Redcaps
buff_box.description: Redcaps track the number of enemies destroyed. For each enemy destroyed, the damage of all Redcaps is increased by 10% (additively).

variants.name: The Path of Trials
variants.restrictionsText: In each boss area, a random young chromatic Dragon appears with the normal area boss. The additional boss must also be defeated to progress. Only Champions with a WIS of 14 or higher can be used. If Alyndra is in your formation, the Dragon spawns with half health.

variants.name: Bad Odds in Avernus
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a total ability score sum that is odd.
A Gelatinous Cube joins the formation. All it does is gurgle in the back of the formation.

variants.name: Zapper Overload
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with STR of 13 or higher can be used. In areas 1-40, the Demon Zapper is overcharged, overloading, and targeting the Champions! Champions zapped take damage and are affected by one of the following effects: Teleport - The Champion is removed from the formation. Sear - The Champion takes 50% more damage from the beam for each Champion adjacent to them. Enfeeble - The Champion's damage drops to 0 for the next 30 seconds.

buff_box.name: Zapper Overload
buff_box.description: The Demon Zapper is no longer targeting fiends, it's targeting the Champions! Every 10 seconds, one member of the formation is zapped by the Demon Zapper. In addition to taking massive damage, Champions zapped have one of the following effects happen to them:|- Teleport - The Champion is 'removed' from the formation and you are unable to use them until you change areas. This can only happen once per area.|- Sear - The Champion takes 50% more damage from the beam for each Champion adjacent to them.|- Enfeeble - The Champion's damage drops to 0 for the next 30 seconds.

variants.name: Best Friend Search Squad!
variants.restrictionsText: Bubbles & Cinnamon have formed a search party for Lulu, joining the formation for this adventure. Enemies drop 99% less gold. Only Champions with CHA of 13 or lower can be used.

variants.name: An Even Worse Time in Avernus
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a total ability score sum that is even.
1-2 Red Wizard Evokers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Elder Rune Attack
variants.restrictionsText: Whenever you change perspective between Seadeeps and Alterdeep (Areas 1, 21, & 41) the party is affected by a different Elder Rune. The bane effect of the Elder Rune will persist until you change perspective again.

by_area.name: Elder Rune Attack
by_area.desc2: Whenever an enemy spawns, a random Champion takes 20% of their max HP as damage.

by_area.name: Elder Rune Attack
by_area.desc2: Each area a random formation slot is debuffed. Any Champion in that formation slot is stunned. The effect lasts until you change areas.

by_area.name: Elder Rune Attack
by_area.desc2: Monsters drop 90% less gold.

by_area.name: Elder Rune Attack
by_area.desc2: Champions base attack cooldown is increased by 50%

variants.name: The Gargoyle
variants.restrictionsText: Generally only Champions with a magic base attack can be used, but a few extra helping hands tag along as well. In each non-boss area, enemies from a different faction attack. The faction members will not count toward quest progress, nor will they drop gold. Each faction also has a unique boon granted by Halaster which will be active for the entire area.

by_area.name: The Gargoyle
by_area.desc2: Champions base attack cooldown is increased by 2 seconds

by_area.name: The Gargoyle
by_area.desc2: Enemies deal 300% additional damage.

by_area.name: The Gargoyle
by_area.desc2: 5 Abyssal Chickens spawn immediately.

by_area.name: The Gargoyle
by_area.desc2: Champion healing is reduced by 50%

variants.name: Ulkoria's Escape from Alterdeep
variants.restrictionsText:
Every 50 areas, the champion with the lowest Intelligence is captured by mind flayers and removed from the formation. They cannot be added back for the duration of the adventure.
Ulkoria joins the formation in slot 3. She can be moved, but not removed or swapped out, and she will never be taken away by mind flayers.
You may only use Champions with a magical base attack.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: Madcap Adventures Redux
variants.restrictionsText: Madcaps spawn with each wave of enemies If a Madcap deals damage to a Champion, another Madcap immediately bloodspawns from the far side of the screen The bloodspawned Madcaps do not drop gold or count towards quest progress Each time a Madcap is bloodspawned, all Champion's damage is reduced by 99% for 3 seconds

variants.name: When the Going Gets Tough
variants.restrictionsText: Each wave spawns one invulnerable Stone Golem. Only Champions with CON of 15 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Bazaar Companions
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that have the Gold Find role.
5 Wagon escorts join the formation. After every 100 areas, one of the wagons rolls away and frees up the formation slot.

variants.name: Show of Strength
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with STR of 16 or higher can be used

variants.name: Fight Dragons with Dragons
variants.restrictionsText: Non-Dragonborn champions' attack cooldown is tripled making them attack less often. Blue Dragon Wyrmlings appear in each area. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Bahamut's Army
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use Lawful Good champions.

variants.name: Raggadragga's Crew
variants.restrictionsText: Various Lycanthropes appear to hassle the Champions with each wave They do not count towards quest progress, nor do they drop gold See the in-game buff icon for more information

gameChanges.name: Raggadragga's Crew
gameChanges.desc: |Wererat: Enemies drop 99% less gold for each wererat on screen. (multiplicative)||Wereboar: Enemies deal 100% more damage for each wereboar on screen. (additive)||Werebear: Enemies speed is increased by 25% for each werebear on screen. (additive)

variants.name: Just The Worst
variants.restrictionsText: Good Champions cannot be used. Neutral Champions (on the good/evil axis) deal no damage.

variants.name: When Tentacles Attack
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Strength of 10 or lower.
Two tentacles block two formation slots. Every 5 seconds, they attack a random adjacent champion dealing 10% of the Champion's max health.

variants.name: Extreme Heat
variants.restrictionsText: Bel's Forge was built into an active volcano. As such, the formation is taking a bit of heat while adventuring. Every 3 seconds, each Champion takes 10% of their max health as damage. Whenever a Champion's health is below 50% of their max health, their damage is reduced by 99%.

variants.name: Fire and Brimstone
variants.restrictionsText: In each non-boss area, one Lesser Fire Elemental appears with each wave. They do not count towards quest progress, nor do they drop gold. The Elemental's movement is 300% faster. If the Elemental hits with an attack, it explodes and all champions lose 20% of their max HP. In each boss area a Cultist of Zariel appears. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. Only champions with STR of 10 or higher and CHA of 13 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Flames of Avernus
variants.restrictionsText:
Every 10 seconds, a random formation slot catches fire for 10 seconds, dealing damage to any Champion occupying it equal to 10% of their max health every second.
You may not use Cleric Champions.

variants.name: A Tenday at Golgamann's
variants.restrictionsText: Golgamann has some friends over to visit and they do not approve of the Champions! Only Champions with a WIS score of 11 or lower can be used. Skeletons spawn randomly with each enemy wave. These extra skeleton enemies deal 300% more damage, do not drop gold, and do not count towards quests.

variants.name: A Nightmare Occasion
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten and his ally Ireena Kolyana accompany the Champions taking up slots in the formation. Every area, Barovian Wedding Guests arrive. These enemies don't count toward quest progress, nor do they drop any gold. They are intent on recapturing Ireena for their master.

variants.name: Mental Gymnastics
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with an Intelligence of 11 or less.
1-2 mind flayers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Prisoners of Lolth
variants.restrictionsText: All Drow enemies are blessed by Lolth, granting them an initial set of armored hit points that must be cleared before their health can be damaged Only Champions with a STR score of 15 or higher can be used

variants.name: Prisoners of Unknown Choices
variants.restrictionsText: Two of the slots in your formation are cursed due to the choices made by some massively powerful unseen force! The cursed slots change every 15 seconds by moving to a random adjacent slot. Champions in cursed slots can not attack and all their upgrades are disabled.

variants.name: Rime Bandits
variants.restrictionsText: Arctic Bandits appear in each area. They do not drop gold or count for quest progress. Enemies drop 99% less gold. When an Arctic Bandit enemy damages a Champion, the Champion is stunned for 2 seconds.

variants.name: Giant-Size Adventure
variants.restrictionsText: The great writer Volothamp Geddarm accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation and debuffing the damage of everyone adjacent. Non-giant creatures are scaled up, creating the sort of harrowing tale that Volo is famous for. Enemies move 100% faster and deal 200% more damage.

variants.name: Power of Three
variants.restrictionsText: Only Event Champions from Year Three can be used.

variants.name: Enemy Summit
variants.restrictionsText: Unique enemies from the previous four campaigns appear in each area. These unique enemies each have special abilities that stay active until they are defeated.

gameChanges.name: Enemy Summit
gameChanges.desc: |-Strahd Zombie: Enemies drop 99% less gold.|-Batiri Goblin: Enemies attack 25% faster.|-Gazer: Enemies deal 100% additional damage.|-Abyssal Chicken: Enemies move 100% faster

variants.name: Mirage Arcane
variants.restrictionsText: In an effort to help the Champions weather the cold, Chadwick joins them and attempts to practice with some new spell scrolls. The terrain around the Champions changes, and not always to the Champions' advantage. This adventure has unique dialogue.

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Dungeon Illusion: Champions Attack 0.5 seconds slower

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Chult Illusion: Champions deal 200% more damage

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Ravenloft Illusion: Enemies deal 200% more damage

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Avernus Illusion: Enemies drop 99% less gold

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Farm Illusion: Additional Scarecrows spawn they do not drop gold or count for progress

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Dungeon Illusion: Champions Attack 0.5 seconds slower

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Chult Illusion: Champions deal 200% more damage

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Ravenloft Illusion: Enemies deal 200% more damage

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Avernus Illusion: Enemies drop 99% less gold

buff_box.name: Mirage Arcane
buff_box.description: Farm Illusion: Additional Scarecrows spawn they do not drop gold or count for progress

variants.name: Only Human
variants.restrictionsText: A random Human Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed. Other Human Champions cannot be used. In each area, enemies move 2% faster and deal 4% more damage, stacking additively.

variants.name: An Awakened Axe
variants.restrictionsText: The Awakened Axe Beak arrives in each area with 5 armored hit points. The Awakened Axe Beak deals damage equal to 50% of your Champions' max health.

variants.name: CONtagious Cold
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. Frozen Twig Blights appear in each area and attempt to stop the Champions. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Whenever a Frozen Twig Blight attacks a Champion, the entire formation is stunned for 1 second. Only Champions with CON 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Ten in Ten-Towns
variants.restrictionsText:
A random Champion from seat 10 is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, but can be moved.
Champions from the first two bench seats cannot be used.

variants.name: Trench Coat Run
variants.restrictionsText: Kobolds in a trench coat attack in each area. Once initially defeated, the kobolds spill out of the trench coat creating 3 new enemies! As a kobold in a trench coat, they move 100% faster. After the kobolds fall out of the trench coat, they each deal 300% additional damage. Only Champions with DEX score of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: The Taunting Lord
variants.restrictionsText: Rudolph van Richten accompanies the Champions taking up a slot in the formation. The mists of Ravenloft have invaded Undermountain, infusing the entire area with an unnatural charm. Strahd taunts the Champions, foreshadowing their upcoming failure to save Ten-Towns. Vampire Spawn appear in each boss area and deal 300% additional damage. Only Champions with WIS of 12 or higher can be used. This adventure contains unique dialogue.

variants.name: Lone Wolf Party
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions that aren't part of an affiliation can be used.
A Winter Wolf  appears with each non-boss wave. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
A Winter Wolf Alpha appears at the start of each boss area. They must be defeated in order to progress.

variants.name: The Archduke's Blessing
variants.restrictionsText: A Cultist of Zariel arrives in each area to celebrate Zariel. The cultist has 4 armored hit points and deals 300% additional damage. While the Cultist of Zariel is on screen, bosses cannot be damaged.

variants.name: A Neutral Party
variants.restrictionsText: Two ravens fill the formation. Only Champions that are part or totally neutral may be used.

variants.name: Heralds of Evil
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Evil Champions.
1-2 Heralds of Dust Remnants spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Relentless Peril
variants.restrictionsText: Elturel Ghouls now attack in each area. They have 2x as much health as normal and, when they take a killing blow, they are stunned for 10 seconds before coming back to life (they still drop gold and quest items and count towards the quest each time they are killed).

variants.name: Rickety Rubble
variants.restrictionsText: Two Rolling Rocks fill two random formation slots. The rocks move to new formation slots after every 50 areas. Only Champions with a DEX of 14 or higher may be used.

variants.name: Cake or Death?
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Lawful Champions.
1-2 Cakers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.
Every 3 seconds, a Cake lands on a random Champion, dealing 5% of their total max health. This damage additively increases by 5% for each cake that drops in the current area, and is reset when changing areas.

variants.name: Mimic Perception
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with WIS of 13 or higher can be used. One of the Mimic Tavern Items accompanies the party, intent on helping you find the lantern. In each area, the mimic plant gets distracted by something that is either blue, green, or red, thinking it is the lantern. It accidentally grants a buff to the enemies based on which color it's excited about. - Blue - Enemies deal 300% additional damage. - Green - Enemies' speed is increased by 100%. - Red - Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

by_area.name: Mimic Perception
by_area.desc2: Enemies deal 300% more damage

by_area.name: Mimic Perception
by_area.desc2: Enemies move 100% faster

by_area.name: Mimic Perception
by_area.desc2: Gold Find reduced by 99%

variants.name: Frozen in Fear
variants.restrictionsText: Each area, gnoll vampires appear from the Rime . They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Whenever a gnoll vampire deals damage to a Champion, that Champion is stunned for 2 seconds. All Champions' normal attack cooldown is increased by 1 second, unless Havilar is in your formation.

variants.name: It's Cold Out There Today
variants.restrictionsText:
It's snowing heavily in all outdoor areas.
Due to the blowing snow, it's too cold to hold weapons. You may only use Champions with magic attacks.

variants.name: Fortress Assault
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with STR of 15 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Hats off to you!
variants.restrictionsText: Baeloth and his illusory fancy red pandas are back! Fancy red pandas in top hats riding unicycles attack with each wave of enemies. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. While these distracting red pandas are on screen, all enemies deal 200% additional damage. Only Champions with DEX of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: It's Cold Out There Every Day
variants.restrictionsText: You can only use Champions that have CON as their highest ability score, including ties.

variants.name: Don't Pick at the Scab
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with WIS and INT of 12 or Higher can be used.

variants.name: Going To Eleven
variants.restrictionsText:
A random Champion from seat 11 is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, but can be moved.
Champions from the first two bench seats cannot be used.

variants.name: Strong and Healthy
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a STR and CON of 14+.
1-2 Vampires spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
Undead monsters deal 100% more damage and have 100% more health for every 100 areas completed, stacking multiplicatively.

variants.name: The Madness of Yeenoghu
variants.restrictionsText: Enemies deal 200% additional damage, and move 200% faster. Whenever a Champion destroys an enemy, the Champion is stunned for a duration equal to their base attack cooldown.

variants.name: Reya Reborn
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with STR of 10 or higher and CHA of 13 or higher can be used. In each area, additional fiends sent by Zariel appear. One random fiend spawns at the end of the first wave. An additional fiend is added every 100 areas. Each fiend has a unique buff for effect on the area.

buff_box.name: Reya Reborn
buff_box.description: It is time for Reya Mantlemorn to become a Champion, but Zariel has positioned a fiendish army to stand in her way.|Each area, one or more of these special enemies spawns. While they are alive, the listed effect is active: |Bearded Devil - Gold Find is reduced by 99%.|Black Abishai - Champion damage is reduced by 99%.|Erinyes - Champions damaged by enemies are stunned for 1 second. Getting damaged again resets the timer.|Lemure - Ultimate attacks are unavailable until this enemy is destroyed.|Merregon - The damage of all enemies is increased by 200%.|Spined Devil - All enemies move 200% faster.|White Abishai - The base attack cooldown of all Champions is increased by 1 second.

variants.name: A Rider's Time to Shine
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are either Good or Lawful.
1-2 Spined Devils attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Devil monsters deal 100% more damage and have 100% more health for every 100 areas completed, stacking multiplicatively.

variants.name: Quick Thinking
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with INT of 12 or higher and WIS of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Tough Acting
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with STR of 14 or higher and CON of 15 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Witty Riposting
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with DEX of 15 or higher and CHA of 16 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Frontline Fighters
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with STR of 15 or higher and CON of 16 or higher can be used.

variants.name: A Chilling Encounter
variants.restrictionsText: Every 5 seconds, a random champion is stunned for 5 seconds due to the freezing cold. With each boss, an extra white Dragon Wyrmling boss with 25 armored HP appears. The main boss is invulnerable until the white dragon is defeated.

buff_box.name: Freezing Cold
buff_box.description: Every 5 seconds, a random champion is Stunned for 5 seconds due to the freezing cold.

variants.name: How Far Away is Thay
variants.restrictionsText:
Volo joins the formation. He doesn't do much other than get in the way.
1-2 Red Wizard Abjurers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Dive Bomb
variants.restrictionsText: A Peryton appears in each area. Only Champions with DEX of 16 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Fire and Ice
variants.restrictionsText:
Evil champions may not be used. Neutral (on the good/evil axis) champions deal no damage.
In Non-Boss levels, each wave creates an extra 1-3 random devils.
Redeemed Zariel  accompanies the formation.

variants.name: Don't Lose Your Head
variants.restrictionsText:
An Intellect Devourer spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress. 
If an Intellect Devourer reaches the formation, it leaps onto the head of a random Champion with an INT score of at least 11, eats their brain, and removes them from the formation for the rest of the adventure.

variants.name: Mimic Vengeance
variants.restrictionsText: Three mimics from Caer-Konig have stowed away in our packs! They join the formation and proceed to talk quite sternly.

variants.name: REALLY Frozen Vengeance
variants.restrictionsText: The cold causes all Champion base attack cooldowns to be doubled, making them attack less often. Each area has the Snow weather effect. Only slow Champions with a DEX of 13 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Mind Spike
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 Mind Flayers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.
When a Mind Flayer spawns it Mind Blasts a random Champion, dealing 25% of their max health and stunning them for 60 seconds. Champions with an INT score of 15 or higher take no damage and are not stunned.

adventure.name: The Battle of High Hall Tower

variants.name: Might Makes Right
variants.restrictionsText: Champion damage is reduced by 99%. Only Champions with a STR of 18 or higher can be used.

variants.name: The Stunning Tower Battle
variants.restrictionsText:
Every 15 seconds, your top damage dealing Champion is stunned for 15 seconds.
Whenever you move a Champion in the formation, they are stunned for 15 seconds.

variants.name: The Pumpkins from High Hall Tower
variants.restrictionsText:
Two Pumpkin Sprouts join the formation.
Every 5 seconds, a thrown pumpkin hits a random Champion in the formation, requiring a DEX save or their next attack is delayed by 5 seconds.

variants.name: Gargauth's Betrayal
variants.restrictionsText: Gargauth's betrayal saps the will of the Champions, who are facing ruin at every turn. From area 26 onward, Gargauth the Pit Fiend has a 25% chance of appearing in each non-boss area. Whenever he doesn't spawn the chance increases by 25% (additively) until he does spawn. While Gargauth is on screen, all other enemies are invulnerable.

variants.name: Lulu's Last Stand
variants.restrictionsText:
Lulu the Hollyphant joins the formation. Only Champions adjacent to Lulu can deal damage.
You may only use Champions with a STR of 10+ and a CHA of 13+.

variants.name: Reya's Last Stand
variants.restrictionsText:
Every 25 areas, a random champion with the lowest Dexterity will be sucked into a portal and removed from the formation. They cannot be added back for the duration of the adventure.
Reya starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. (She also can't be sucked into a portal.)
You may only use Champions that are either Good or Lawful.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: Demons Here, Demons There
variants.restrictionsText: Various Demons appear in each area, causing havoc for the Champions. While the additional demons are alive, they grant a buff to enemies, or a debuff to the Champions. - Abyssal Chicken - Champions' normal attack cooldown is increased by 1 second. - Bulezau - Enemy Damage is increased by 100% - Quasit - Enemy Speed is increased by 100%

variants.name: Visions of Hornfirth
variants.restrictionsText: Bubbles has created an illusion of Ogres to remind us of our trip to Hornfirth. How kind! Bubbles the Hollyphant joins the formation. Each wave has a 50% chance of spawning 1 or 2 Ogre Battering Rams. Ogres do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Only Champions with CON of 14 or higher can be used.

gameChanges.name: Visions of Hornfirth
gameChanges.desc: |Enemies have their damage and movement speed increased by 100% for each Ogre Battering Ram on screen (additive).

variants.name: Stragglers
variants.restrictionsText: Two of your fellow prisoners from Velkynvelve have caught up with the Champions and accompany them on this variant. Gold find is reduced by 99%

variants.name: Volo's Guide to Kuo-toa
