variants.restrictionsText: Volo and a Kuo-toa join the formation chatting up your team.  Champions adjacent to Volo or the Kuo-toa have their base attack cooldown increased by 1 second (does not stack if adjacent to both).

variants.name: Ambitious Speakers - Part 1
variants.restrictionsText: Oarus, the Speaker of Termalaine, joins the Champions on their adventure, taking up a slot in your formation, but not doing much else. Only Champions with CHA of 16 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Shady Sidekicks - Part 1
variants.restrictionsText: Two Shadar-Kai warriors join the formation. Only Champions with a WIS of 15 or higher may be used.

variants.name: Baldur's Gate Expatriates - Part 1
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 Emperor Vecna Cultists spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may only use Champions from the Heroes of Baldur's Gate or Absolute Adversaries affiliation.

variants.name: Ambitious Speakers - Part 2
variants.restrictionsText: Oarus, the Speaker of Termalaine, joins the Champions on their adventure, taking up a slot in your formation, but not doing much else. Only Champions with CHA of 16 or higher can be used. Bosses deal 100% additional damage.

variants.name: Shady Sidekicks - Part 2
variants.restrictionsText: Two Shadar-Kai warriors join the formation. Only Champions with a WIS of 15 or higher may be used. Bosses deal 200% additional damage.

variants.name: Baldur's Gate Expatriates - Part 2
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 Emperor Vecna Cultists spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may only use Champions from the Heroes of Baldur's Gate or Absolute Adversaries affiliation.
Bosses deal 500% additional damage.

variants.name: Mysteries Unlocked
variants.restrictionsText: Only Champions with INT of 13 or higher AND WIS of 13 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Male Pattern Boldness
variants.restrictionsText:
A random male or nonbinary Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, but can be moved.
Female Champions cannot be used.

variants.name: A Key Factor
variants.restrictionsText:
A random female or nonbinary Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed.
Male Champions cannot be used.

variants.name: Cackling Horror
variants.restrictionsText: Tekeli-li's cackling laughter echoes through the Caves of Hunger, increasing the base attack cooldown of all Champions by 1 second. Only Champions with WIS of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Working for the Weak End
variants.restrictionsText:
Two frozen Twig Blights join the formation.
Only Champions with a STR of 10 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Run Away!
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a DEX of 18 or higher.
1-2 Gnoll Vampires attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Fungal Excitation
variants.restrictionsText: Underdark Spore Servants from elsewhere in the underdark appear in each area. They do not count towards quest progress, nor do they drop gold. Each time you re-encounter an area, the number of Underdark Spore Servants increases!

variants.name: Crimson Perception
variants.restrictionsText: In each boss area, a young red dragon appears which must be defeated to advance. Only Champions with WIS of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Watchful Eyes
variants.restrictionsText:
Two Zhentarim spies  join the formation for this adventure. 
Only Champions with CHA of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Maroon Madness
variants.restrictionsText: Red Wyrmlings appear in each area. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Red Wyrmlings should not be in Mantol-Derith. When a Champion kills a Red Wyrmling, they are stunned for 4 seconds as they try to understand what's happening. Only Champions with WIS 12 or lower can be used.

adventure.name: The Rite of the Arcane Octad

variants.name: Alien Allies
variants.restrictionsText:
Aspix the Nothic accompanies the formation, quietly 'borrowing' a portion of your loot!
Gold find is reduced by 99%.

variants.name: An Icewind Dale Reunion
variants.restrictionsText:
Pavel and Kara join the formation.
Only core and evergreen Champions can be used.

variants.name: Eight for the Octad
variants.restrictionsText:
A random Champion from seat 8 is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed.
Champions from the first four bench seats cannot be used.
Professor Orb and Aspix start in the formation. They just get in the way.

variants.name: Ineffectual Intellectuals
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with INT of 14 or higher can be used.
Champions' normal attack cooldowns are increased by 1 second.

variants.name: The Archaeologist and the Sailor
variants.restrictionsText:
Kent and Virgil join the formation. They can be moved but not removed.
You can't use DPS champions unless they are from the Rivals of Waterdeep affiliation.

variants.name: Cryophilic Combatants
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are 75 years old or more.
1-2 White Abishai spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Whenever a Champion takes damage, their base attack cooldown is increased by 0.5 seconds until the area changes, stacking additively.

variants.name: Keep Your Friends Close
variants.restrictionsText: Kingsport, the awakened giant penguin, joins the formation in an effort to not have him fall into a trap this time. In Area 50, the other Gelatinous Cubes are invulnerable until the one with Kingsport in it is destroyed. Enemies move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage.

variants.name: Willing to Sacrifice
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Chaotic Evil champions can deal damage.
After every 50 areas, a random active non-Chaotic Evil Champion is permanently removed from the formation.
Once a Champion is added to the formation they can not be removed.

variants.name: Pay the Price
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with the gold find role.
1-2 Mezzoloth mercenaries spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Other enemies drop 99.99% less gold.

variants.name: And Your Enemies Closer
variants.restrictionsText: The Professor Orb appears in each area with 3 armored HP. Until it is destroyed, all enemies are invulnerable. Champions will prioritize attacking the Professor Orb if possible. Only Champions with INT of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Devilishly Cold
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Tiefling Champions.
It's snowing in each area. Brr!

variants.name: Fiendishly Fierce
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Drow Champions.
1-2 Spined Devils spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may not remove Champions from the formation. (They can be moved as normal.)
Non-boss area requirements are reduced by 5% for each empty formation slot, stacking additively.

variants.name: Nightmare Rats!
variants.restrictionsText: Squiddly & Jenks join the formation. Burning Rats appear in each area. They don't drop any gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

variants.name: An Unexpected Geist
variants.restrictionsText: One Specter appears in each wave. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. When they are killed, they respawn in the same location after 5 seconds. The Specters move 200% faster.

variants.name: Back to Nature
variants.restrictionsText:
A Shambling Mound joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation, but don't do much else.
Only Elves, Half-Elves, and Gnomes (of any class) and Druids, Barbarians, and Rangers (of any race) can be used.

variants.name: A Monarch Among Us
variants.restrictionsText: Nat joins the formation. Enemies move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage. Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

variants.name: A Dragon Against Us
variants.restrictionsText: Green Dragon Wyrmlings appear in each area. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Only Champions with DEX of 15 or higher can be used.

variants.name: A Familiar Behind Us
variants.restrictionsText: Champions' normal attack cooldown is increased by 5 seconds. Gale the Miniature Giant Seahorse joins the formation. Champions next to Gale have their normal attack cooldown decreased by 1 second for each familiar assigned to click enemies. Only Champions with a Charisma of 16 or higher may be used.

variants.name: Sticky Fingers
variants.restrictionsText: Sowpig appears in each boss area with 4 armored HP and you must defeat her to progress. Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

variants.name: Patron Party
variants.restrictionsText: Escort Redeemed Zariel in slot 3, Mirt in slot 7, and Vajra in slot 9.

variants.name: Go Fourth
variants.restrictionsText: Only Event Champions from Year Four can be used.

variants.name: Don't Breathe the Marsh Gas
variants.restrictionsText: Additional Marsh Gas Bubbles appear in each area. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Only Champions with a Ranged or Magical base attack can be used.

variants.name: Don't Blast the Brigands
variants.restrictionsText: Additional Harengon Brigands appear in each area. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Fog is everywhere, impeding ranged attack. Only Champions with a melee or Magical base attack can be used.

variants.name: Don't Squeeze the Spiders
variants.restrictionsText:
Additional Giant Spiders appear in each area. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Only Champions with a melee or ranged base attack can be used.
Champions' base attack cooldowns are increased by 3 seconds.

variants.name: Always Watching
variants.restrictionsText: In each boss area, Iriolarthas the Demilich appears. He must be defeated in order to progress. Only Champions with WIS of 14 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Rulebreakers
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
1-2 Harmonium Peacekeepers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Class Clown
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
Champion damage is reduced by 99% for each Champion in the formation that is not a Bard, stacking multiplicatively.
1-2 ranged Space Clowns attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Icequake
variants.restrictionsText:
- From area 30 onward, an earthquake occurs every 20-120 seconds. Earthquakes cause falling pieces of ice hit the Champions, dealing damage equal to 75% of their max health and stunning them for 15 seconds, subject to a DEX save. 
- The earthquake also triggers the following effects for 15 seconds if one or more Champions fail the save.
  - Champion damage is reduced by 99.9%.
  - Enemies move 200% faster.

gameChanges.name: Icequake!
gameChanges.desc: For each point their Dexterity score is above 10, a Champion has a 10% chance to save against the effects from the Icequake!

variants.name: A Lesson in Classes
variants.restrictionsText:
- Xerophon joins the formation for this adventure to see what it's like to fight alongside the Champions. They don't attack, they're just here to observe. 
- Only one Champion of each class can be included in the formation at any time. Multiclass Champions count for all of their classes. Xerophon does not have a class for this variant.
- In an attempt to distract and confuse the enemies, Xerophon transforms into the first enemy who spawns in each area, increasing damage against that type of enemy by 100% for the rest of the area.

variants.name: Xerophon's Ythryn Zenith
variants.restrictionsText:
Xerophon starts in the formation with their ultimate unlocked. They can be moved, but not removed.
After area 10, Champions can only deal damage while Xerophon is imitating an enemy with their Perfect Imitation ultimate attack.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Every 50 areas, a random Champion that matches the highest number of Xerophon's specialization choices is removed from the formation and can not be used again in the adventure. In the case of a tie, a random tied Champion is picked. If you have not chosen any spec choices for Xerophon, a random Champion is picked. Xerophon themself is never removed.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

adventure.name: The Prince of a Thousand Enemies

variants.name: Uncommon Allies
variants.restrictionsText: No Human, Dwarf, or Elf Champions can be used

variants.name: The Birds
variants.restrictionsText:
Ravens appear at the start of every non-boss area. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress.
Only Champions with Melee or Ranged base attacks can be used.

variants.name: Where the Magic Happens
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with a Magical base attack can be used.
Whenever a Champion attacks and doesn't kill at least one monster, the Champion is stunned for 5 seconds.

variants.name: First Third Out
variants.restrictionsText: Only bench seats 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10, and 11 may be used. Two Will-o'-Wisp join the formation.

variants.name: Second Third Out
variants.restrictionsText:
Only bench seats 1, 3, 4, 6, 7, 9, 10, and 12 may be used.
Two ravens  join the formation

variants.name: Third Third Out
variants.restrictionsText:
Only bench seats 2, 3, 5, 6, 8, 9, 11, and 12 may be used.
Two Giant Frogs join the formation in slots 5 and 6.

variants.name: I'm Sure I Saw It Move!
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with a WIS of 12 or lower may be used.
In Non-Boss areas, each wave spawns an extra 3-5 random Taxidermy Animals. 
They don't drop gold, or count towards quest progress.
In Boss areas, The second wave spawns a Taxidermy Monstrosity boss enemy. It must also be defeated to progress.

variants.name: End of the Line
variants.restrictionsText:
A random Champion from seat 12 is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, but can be moved.
Champions from the first two bench seats cannot be used.

variants.name: A Steadfast Love
variants.restrictionsText:
A one legged Tin Soldier and a Toy Ballerina join the formation.
1-2 Lesser Fire Elementals spawn with each wave. They like to melt tin.

variants.name: Zarak's Revenge
variants.restrictionsText:
An Awakened Toadstool joins the formation. Champions next to the Toadstool have their base attack cooldown increased by 5s.
In Boss areas, Zarak appears. 
It must also be defeated to progress.
In Area 50, Zarak has 50 armored HP.

variants.name: Bully for You!
variants.restrictionsText:
A Bullywug joins the formation. Every 25 areas the bullywug leaps to a new formation slot of the Champion from the bench seat with the most available Champions.
Any Champion the Bullywug leaps on is knocked out for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: The Magical Rings of Thither
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 Emperor Vecna Cultists spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may only use Champions with a Magic base attack.

variants.name: Undergeared
variants.restrictionsText: Only valid Champions with the lowest average ilevels (average level of items in their equipment loot slots) in each bench seat can be used.

variants.name: Underdark Chill
variants.restrictionsText:
The tunnels are unnaturally cold. The weather is snowing in every area.
1-3 Ice Piercers spawn randomly with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor do they count toward quest progress.
You can't use Champions that have CON as their lowest ability score, including ties.

variants.name: Thoughts on the Menu
variants.restrictionsText:
A mind flayer joins the formation to help you defeat this rogue colony.
To avoid being lunch, only Champions with an INT score of 12 or lower can be used.

variants.name: Brains on Ice
variants.restrictionsText:
An Intellect Devourer riding a Snow Golem joins the formation. Champions next to the Intellect Devourer have their base attack cooldown increased by 5 seconds.
1-3 Mind Flayer Zombies spawn randomly with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor do they count toward quest progress.

variants.name: Levelheaded
variants.restrictionsText: You can't level Champions past level 1000.

variants.name: Next Level
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't level Champions past level 900.
1-2 Young Red Dragons spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Critical Level
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't level Champions past level 750.
Champions have an additional 20% chance (additive) to deal critical hits.
Two Shadowy Rats join the formation.
Whenever a Champion next to a Shadowy Rat deals a critical hit, enemies gain 100% move speed and 100% health, stacking multiplicatively up to 10 times per enemy.

variants.name: It's So Pretty...
variants.restrictionsText:
You can only use Champions with a DEX of 13 or lower. 
You can't use Champions with the Speed tag.

variants.name: A Bad Trip Down Memory Lane
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are wiser than they are quick.
Every wave spawns a random enemy. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Head over Heals
variants.restrictionsText:
A random Healing Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed.
Other Champions with the Healing role cannot be used.
Enemy damage is increased by 200%.

variants.name: The Cult of Vecna
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are more charismatic than they are strong.
Enemies have their damage increased by 25% for each enemy present, stacking multiplicatively.
There is a 50% chance that Vecna and 5 cultists spawn in the first wave of every area. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.

adventure.name: The Demon Lords of the Abyss

variants.name: Speed Demons
variants.restrictionsText:
Each wave spawns 1-3 Abyssal Chickens that drops no gold nor counts towards quest progress. 
Demon enemy speed, damage, and health are increased by 200%.

variants.name: Doom and Domination
variants.restrictionsText:
Bosses can't be stunned, and they immediately start to enrage upon spawning.
Every 10 seconds, your current BUD-setting Champion is dominated and therefore Stunned for 10 seconds.

variants.name: All Damage, All The Time
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use Champions with the DPS role.

variants.name: Will of the Frozen Feywild
variants.restrictionsText:
1-3 Winter Eladrin spawn randomly with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor do they count toward quest progress.
You can't use Champions that have DEX as their lowest ability score, including ties.

variants.name: No Damage, None of the Time
variants.restrictionsText: You may not use any Champions with the DPS tag.

variants.name: The Loots of Loomlurch
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use Champions with the Gold Find role.

variants.name: The Lutes of Loomlurch
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use up to 3 champions in the formation that aren't Bards.

variants.name: The Boots of Loomlurch
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use Speed Champions.

variants.name: Pincushion Party
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 additional ranged spear-throwing Goblins appear with each wave.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.

variants.name: G. O. A. T.
variants.restrictionsText:
A giant goat joins the formation.
You can't use Champions that have WIS as their lowest ability score, including ties.

variants.name: Last But Not Yeast
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Lawful Champions.
1-2 Cakers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Strength of Character
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a STR of 13 or higher.
After every 100 areas, the Champion that has dealt the most damage is removed from the formation and becomes unavailable for the rest of the adventure.

variants.name: The Invisible Wizards of Thay
variants.restrictionsText: 1-2 Red Wizard Illusionists spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. They are invisible until they attack and can't be attacked while invisible.

variants.name: The Lightning Peaks of Yon
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 10 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
After area 10, every 5 seconds, a bolt of lightning zaps a random Champion, dealing damage equal to 25% of their max health and stunning them for 5 seconds.
1-2 Blue Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Speeds of Destruction
variants.restrictionsText:
A random Speed Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed.
Other Speed Champions cannot be used.

variants.name: Owlbear Necessities
variants.restrictionsText:
A snowy owlbear joins the formation. 
Only champions next to the Owlbear or next to a Druid Champion can deal damage.

variants.name: Elf Help
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Elf and Half-Elf Champions.
Laeral Silverhand joins the formation. Only Champions next to her can deal damage.

variants.name: Flapjacks and Waffles
variants.restrictionsText:
Flapjack joins the formation. Champions adjacent to Flapjack deal no damage as they are too distracted with thoughts of breakfast.
Every 5 seconds, a giant waffle lands on a random Champion, dealing 25% of their health in damage.

variants.name: Best Thay Ever
variants.restrictionsText: 1-2 Red Wizard Transmuters spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. When they are defeated, they polymorph into a beast and must be defeated again.

variants.name: Send In The Clowns
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Wisdom score of 10 or lower.
1-2 Space Clowns attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Overwhelmed with Knowledge
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with an INT of 15 or higher may be used.
The Overwhelm for all Champions is set to 1.

variants.name: A Demi-god's Defender
variants.restrictionsText: At the start of each area, a Zombie Minotaur appears with ten armored hit points. They can only be damaged by magical attacks.

variants.name: Emperor Vecna Lives
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 Emperor Vecna Cultists spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may only use Champions with a Charisma of 13 or lower.

variants.name: Well Equipped
variants.restrictionsText:
- Only Champions with Rare or better equipment in every equipment slot may be used.
- A wizard student joins the formation. They just get in the way.

variants.name: More Than Well Equipped
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with at least two Epic equipment or better may be used.
Two wizard students join the formation. They just get in the way.

variants.name: Very Well Equipped
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with at least four Epic equipment or better may be used.
Three wizard students join the formation. They just get in the way.

variants.name: Arcane Efforts
variants.restrictionsText: Only artificer, bard, sorcerer, warlock, and wizard Champions can be used.

variants.name: Keep Your Distance
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't use Champions that have INT as their lowest ability score, including ties.
Champions with melee attacks deal no damage.

variants.name: Shadows in the Tomb
variants.restrictionsText:
Areas with no weather are instead dark and foggy due to the Shadowfell's influence.
You may only use Champions with a magic attack.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
A Shadar-kai Soul Monger spawns before the first wave of each boss area. You must defeat this additional boss to advance, and you can't damage other enemies until the Soul Monger is defeated.

variants.name: To Avernus in a Handbasket
variants.restrictionsText: Delina starts in the formation. She can't be swapped out or removed. You can't use other Champions with the DPS role. In all non-boss areas, whenever a non-poultry fiend is defeated, an Abyssal Chicken spawns. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Hands Off!
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with Magic base attacks.
Each wave spawns 1-2 severed hands. They don't drop gold nor count for quest progress.

variants.name: Bel of the Ball
variants.restrictionsText:
The only Champion that can deal damage is the one in the middle of the formation.
Bel spawns in each boss area. He must also be defeated to advance.

variants.name: Weak Doesn't Mean Feeble
variants.restrictionsText: You can't use Champions that have STR as their highest ability score, including ties.

variants.name: Frail Doesn't Mean Broken
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't use Champions that have CON as their highest ability score, including ties.
1-2 Zhentarim Spies spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Foolish Doesn't Mean Clueless
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't use Champions that have WIS as their highest ability score, including ties.
A Fool joins the formation. Champions adjacent to the fool are distracted and have their base attack cooldown increased by 2 seconds.

adventure.name: The Castle of a Thousand Vecnas

variants.name: Clumsy Doesn't Mean Inept
variants.restrictionsText: You can't use Champions that have DEX as their highest ability score, including ties.

variants.name: Unreasonable Doesn't Mean Stupid
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't use Champions that have INT as their highest ability score, including ties.
1 Red Wizard Necromancer and 1-2 skeletons spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Boring Doesn't Mean Useless
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't use Champions that have CHA as their highest ability score, including ties.
A Chicken joins the formation. Champions adjacent to the chicken are distracted and have their base attack cooldown increased by 2 seconds.

variants.name: Kas the Bloody Handed
variants.restrictionsText:
Kas joins the formation. Only Champions next to Kas can deal damage.
1-2 Relentless Undead spawn with each wave. When they are defeated they come back to life after 5 seconds.
Undead creatures are Kas' Favored Foe and take 100% extra damage from all attacks.

variants.name: Find a Wooden Stake
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with Melee base attacks can deal damage.
1-2 Vampires spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: You Better Watch Out
variants.restrictionsText:
The weather is snowing in all areas.
You can only use Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 or less seconds.
Attack cooldowns are doubled due to the cold.
1-2 Winter Wolves spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Kas the Destroyer
variants.restrictionsText:
Kas joins the formation.
Every 200 areas, all Champions are removed and can't be used again during this adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.

variants.name: Kas the Betrayer
variants.restrictionsText:
You must have Kas unlocked.
Kas starts in the formation.
Every 100 areas, all Champions are removed (other than Kas) and can't be used again during this adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: Kas the DPS
variants.restrictionsText:
Kas starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may not use any other Champions that have the DPS role.
A random elemental boss spawns in the first wave of non-boss areas. These bosses don't drop gold or loot bags, or count towards quest progress.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
At the start of each area, Champions take damage equal to 30% of their max health.
Champions that aren't Evil deal no damage with their base attacks.

variants.name: Pin and Skewer
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use Champions that have an ability score total of 85 or more.

variants.name: En Passant
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 9 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
Enemies with Melee attacks spawn directly in front of the first column of Champions.
Enemies only take 1 point of damage when attacked or clicked on for the first 1 second after they spawn.

variants.name: Endgame
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that have all Epic equipment and an average item level of at least 1000.
Quest Requirements for the first 300 areas are reduced by 50%.

variants.name: Bully for Vecna
variants.restrictionsText:
You must have Blooshi unlocked. She can be found in the Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventure "The Fairy Rings of Thither", Variant 2.
Blooshi joins the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
You may only use Champions that have a magical base attack.
A Bullywug joins the formation. Every 50 areas the bullywug leaps to a new formation slot. The Bullywug does not knock Blooshi out of the formation.
Any Champion the Bullywug leaps on is knocked out for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: Fight Fire with Fire
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Evil Champions.
Every 100 areas, the Champion that has dealt the most damage in the last 100 areas is removed from the formation and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: Sacrificial Lambs
variants.restrictionsText:
After every 50 areas, a random non-evil Champion is removed from the formation and can't be used for the rest of the adventure. If there are no non-evil Champions left in the formation, an evil Champion is removed instead.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: Clowning Around
variants.restrictionsText:
Space Clowns appear in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count toward quest progress.  
Every five seconds, a giant cream pie falls from the sky and hits a random Champion, dealing 25% of their health in damage and stunning them for ten seconds.

variants.name: The Champion's Guide to Wildspace
variants.restrictionsText: A Plasmoid that just had its home planet destroyed joins the formation. They constantly ask questions so adjacent champions deal no damage due to the distraction.

effects.effect_name: The Champion's Guide to Wildspace Debuff

variants.name: Bosses Lurk Below
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Strength and Charisma of 14 or higher.
Bosses immediately start to enrage upon spawning.
Bosses have 100% additional health, 100% additional speed, and deal 200% additional damage.

variants.name: A Whale of a Time
variants.restrictionsText:
An Adolescent Kindori joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation, but don't do much else.
Only Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher can be used.

variants.name: Not That Type of Helm!
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use fighters or paladins.
All familiars are wearing fancy hats.

variants.name: Shadow Business
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Charisma of 18 or higher.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
In Boss areas, 5 additional Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with the first two waves. They also need to be defeated to progress.

variants.name: Between a Brigganock and a Hard Place
variants.restrictionsText: A Korred and Brigganock join the formation. Champions next to them deal no damage due to their constant squabbling.

effects.effect_name: Between a Brigganock and a Hard Place

variants.name: Tiny Treaty
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use dwarf, goblin, halfling, or kobold champions.
Twice as many monsters spawn with each wave, but quest requirements for each area are doubled.
All monsters are 50% smaller in size, but move +300% faster.

variants.name: None of Your Bee's Knees
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 8 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
A Cyclops Beekeeper joins the formation. After area 10, every second, a random Champion adjacent to the Cyclops is stung for 10% of their max health.

variants.name: The Play's the Thing!
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Charisma of 17 or higher.
The damage of all Champions is increased by 100% for each Champion in the formation with a custom costume, stacking additively.

variants.name: All The World's A Stage
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Bard Champions.
All dialogs start with a random interjection.

variants.name: To Be or Not To Be
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 1 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
When a Champion without the DPS role is defeated, they are removed from the formation and  cannot be added back for the duration of the adventure.

variants.name: A Nimble Approach
variants.restrictionsText:
Gleam joins the formation in search of her sister. She helps you by reducing the base attack speed cooldown of Champions next to her by 1 second and increases their damage by 1000%.
You can only use Champions that have DEX as their highest ability score, including ties.

variants.name: A Wise Approach
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that don't have Wisdom as one of their lowest two stats.
An ancient and wise Willow Treant joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation, but don't do much else.

variants.name: A Strong Approach
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Strength of 17 or higher.
Enemies take a maximum of 25% of their maximum hit points each time they are damaged.
Champions take a minimum of 10% of their maximum hit points each time they are damaged.

variants.name: The Egg of Nat's Desire
variants.restrictionsText:
Nat and Nat's Egg join the formation.
You may only use Gromma or Champions that are 40 years old or younger.

variants.name: The Brains of an Illithid's Desire
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with an ability score total of 78 or less.
1-2 mind flayers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: The Secrets of Vecna's Desire
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are smarter than they are wise.
There is a 50% chance that Vecna spawns in the first wave of every non-boss area. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress. Each time this happens, Vecna's speed and damage increases by 1% for the rest of the adventure, stacking multiplicatively.

adventure.name: No One Can Hear You Scream

variants.name: Anchors Aweigh
variants.restrictionsText: Every 5 seconds, a random Champion loses their footing and flies off the deck for 10 seconds. They are stunned for the duration.

variants.name: Arcane Suppression
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Wisdom of 13 or higher.
Champions with Magic attacks deal no damage.

variants.name: Game Over, Man!
variants.restrictionsText:
A stray cat that Squiddly adopted joins the formation.
1-2 Gray Scavvers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Monstrosity enemies deal 100% additional damage and move 100% faster for each Monstrosity enemy currently present, stacking multiplicatively.

variants.name: Welcome to the Band
variants.restrictionsText:
Four musicians join the formation.
Your champions deal +1000% damage for each Bard in the formation, including the four escorts, stacking multiplicatively.

variants.name: Welcome to the Vrocks
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 Vrocks spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.
Champions with Melee attacks deal no damage.

variants.name: Welcome to the Jungle
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Druid, Barbarian, and/or Ranger Champions.
A random jungle foe spawns with each wave, increasing by 1 for each subsequent wave in the area. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Coasting to the Finish
variants.restrictionsText:
You can't add, move, or remove Champions from the formation after having completed area 25.
You can no longer level up Champions after having completed area 750.
After area 750, game speed is multiplied by x3.

variants.name: Forever Wounded
variants.restrictionsText:
Enemy speed is increased by 300%.
1-2 Vampires spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.

variants.name: Don't Miss with Hiss
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that don't belong to an affiliation.
Nat and Nat's crocodile Hiss joins the formation. Champions next to either of them are busy protecting them and miss with 50% of their attacks.

variants.name: Quick or Quack
variants.restrictionsText:
Every second of real-time in an area reduces all Champion damage by 50%, stacking multiplicatively. Damage is reset to normal at the start of every area.
To mark each real-time second passing, a Fey Duck monster spawns. It drops no gold nor counts towards quest progress.

variants.name: Snicker-Snack
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a melee base attack.
Champions' critical hit chances get a +20% additive bonus and critical damage get a 1000% multiplicative bonus.

variants.name: Click or Clack
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are not a Standard Species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
If a Thri-Kreen Champion is in the formation, click damage is disabled and Fire Breath potions have no effect.

variants.name: Unearthed Arcana
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with the Wizard, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Bard class.
A Lesser Earth Elemental with 4 armored health spawns with each wave. They drop no gold nor count toward quest progress.

variants.name: Fiend Folio
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Drow, Githyanki, Githzerai, Aarakocra, and Tabaxi Champions.
A Flumph escort joins the formation. Only Champions next to the Flumph can deal damage.
1-2 Mezzoloths spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
A Shadow Demon spawns at the start of each Boss area. It must also be defeated to progress.

variants.name: Deities & Demigods
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Cleric and/or Paladin Champions. In addition, you may use Aasimar champions.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: All's Well That Ends Well
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with an ability score total of 78 or less.
A bard joins the formation. They distract adjacent Champions by talking about a play, increasing their base attack cooldowns by 3 seconds.

variants.name: The Final Curtain
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
Each time an enemy is defeated, Champion damage is reduced by 90% until the area changes, stacking multiplicatively.

variants.name: Parting Is Such Sweet Sorrow
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions with the DPS role can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Every 50 areas, all Champions with the DPS role are removed from the formation and can not be used again in the adventure.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: Luigi After Hours
variants.restrictionsText:
Three Wildspace Patrons join the formation. Starting with area 16, they leave and are replaced with Large Luigi, the bartender.
Every 5 seconds, Large Luigi uses his telekinesis eye ray to propel a tankard of ale at the enemy with the most health. This enrages the enemy, causing them to take +100% more damage, but they deal +100% more damage, both stacking multiplicatively.

variants.name: Con Crud
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 Emperor Vecna Cultists spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
In non-boss areas, non-Vecna Cultist monsters are immune from damage until all Emperor Vecna Cultists are defeated.
You can only use Champions with a Constitution of 13 or lower.

variants.name: Snow and Steady
variants.restrictionsText:
The weather is snowing in all areas
You may only use Champions with a Constitution score of 15 or higher.
1-2 Hares spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Each time a Beast is defeated, all enemies for the rest of the area get a +100% boost in speed and damage, stacking additively and capping at 10.

variants.name: Electric Mayhem
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with a magic base attack can deal damage.
Every 5 seconds, a bolt of lightning strikes the Champion that dealt the most damage in the last 5 seconds. This bolt deals 20% of the champion's total health in damage and stuns them for 12 seconds. The stun duration is reduced by 1 second for each Bard in the formation.

variants.name: Modal Nodes
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with a ranged base attack can deal damage.
After area 25, you can't remove Champions from the formation.
After every 50 areas, a random non-Bard Champion is removed from the formation and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.

variants.name: Wyld Stallyns
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Core Champions and Champions released in the first 2 years.
1-2 Skeletal Horses spawn with every wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: 3,720 to 1
variants.restrictionsText:
An asteroid spawns with each wave. If it reaches a Champion, it explodes dealing 50% of the Champion's max health in damage to that Champion. The asteroid drops no gold nor counts toward quest progress.
Only Chaotic champions can deal damage.

variants.name: Never Tell Me The Odds
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions in odd bench seats.
A Tin Soldier and a Modron Slot Machine join the formation.

variants.name: Not Entirely Stable
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
The ground quakes every 30 seconds. The quakes cause a screenshake and debris to hit the Champions, subjecting each Champion to a DEX save. On a failure, they take damage equal to 75% of their max health and are Stunned for 15 seconds

buff_box.name: Earthquake!
buff_box.description: For each point their Dexterity score is above 10, a Champion has a 10% chance to save against the damage from the Earthquake!

variants.name: Krux's Speed Run
variants.restrictionsText:
Commodore Krux joins the formation.
Every 240 seconds of real time play, a random Champion is transported away, removing them from the formation. They are unavailable for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they've been added.

variants.name: Animated Giff
variants.restrictionsText:
Commodore Krux joins the formation.
Every 120 seconds of real time play, a random Champion is transported away, removing them from the formation. They are unavailable for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they've been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

variants.name: Parting Giff
variants.restrictionsText:
Krux starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Each wave, 1-2 additional enemies with a random monster type spawns. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.
Each time an enemy that is NOT any Champion's favored foe is defeated, the enemies gain an Unfavored stack. Enemy speed and damage is increased by 100% for each Unfavored stack, stacking additively. Unfavored stacks cap at 10 and are reset when changing areas.

adventure.name: The Hunt for The Last Breath

variants.name: The Chaotic Hunt for The Last Breath
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use Chaotic champions.

variants.name: The Arcane Hunt for the Last Breath
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a magical base attack.
1-2 Harmonium Peacekeepers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: The Devilish Hunt for the Last Breath
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use Tiefling Champions

variants.name: There's a Flying Snake in my Boot!
variants.restrictionsText:
Each wave spawns 1-2 flying snakes. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may only use Champions with an INT of 13+.

variants.name: You're My Favorite Fighter
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Fighter Champions.
1-2 constructs that are confused as Toys attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Somebody's Poisoned the Waterhole!
variants.restrictionsText:
All the Champions are poisoned. Every second, Champions take damage equal to 2.5% of their max health.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
1-2 watery elementals spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Slow Down Showdown
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a CHA of 14+.
Whenever a Champion defeats an enemy, their base attack cooldown is increased by 1 second, up to a total of 10 seconds. This increase lasts until the area is changed.

variants.name: Night Knight
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Tanking Champions.
1-2 Vampires spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Sleep Tight
variants.restrictionsText: Every 6 seconds, a random Champion falls asleep for 30 seconds. While asleep, they are stunned. Elves, Half-Elves, and Warforged are immune to this.

variants.name: Entrance of the Gladiators
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a WIS of 13 or less.
1 Space Clown spawns at the start of each (non-boss) area. The number of clowns increases by 1 for every 50 areas completed. They don't drop gold nor do they count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Moonlit Madness
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 11 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
After area 10, every 5 seconds, a random Champion succumbs to Space Madness for 10 seconds. While affected, they are stunned.
1-2 Lunar Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Out of the Frying Pan
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not use Champions with a melee base attack.
1-2 fiery elementals spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress
A Fire Elemental joins the formation.

variants.name: Fowl Play
variants.restrictionsText:
An Abyssal Chicken spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Non-boss, non-static monsters take no damage until they have been pushed back, rooted, slowed, or stunned.

variants.name: Owl Prey
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 4 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
A hungry Owlbear joins the formation. Heroes next to the Owlbear deal 100% additional damage.
1-2 Solar Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Time Out
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with an STR of 13 or lower.
After area 5, a temporal anomaly affects a random Champion in each area. They can't attack, be moved, or be removed until you switch areas.

variants.name: Stay On Target
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 7 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
After area 10, every 10 seconds the formation is strafed, dealing damage to all Champions in a horizontal line equal to 50% of their max health.

variants.name: One Spelljammer at a Time
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Good champions.
Champions in the formation deal 100% more damage for each Champion in the formation with a Magic base attack, stacking multiplicatively.

variants.name: One Vecna at a Time
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are smarter than they are strong.
There is a 50% chance that a Vecna Impersonator spawns in the first wave of every area. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress. While this Vecna Impersonator is present, any other enemies are immune to damage.

variants.name: Defense Measures
variants.restrictionsText:
Every 10 seconds of real time, Champions take 25% of their total health in damage from the citadel's magical defenses. This speeds up by 0.5 second every 100 areas (Capped at 1/second)
You may only use three Champions that don't have the Speed tag.

variants.name: A Tough Offense
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are tougher than they are strong.
You may only use three Champions that don't have the DPS tag.

by_expr.expr: hero_id != 155 && (GetStat(`con`) > GetStat(`str`)) && (GetNotTagCount(`dps`) + as_int(hero_slot_id < 0 && !HasTag(`dps`)) - (as_int(IsHeroInFormation(99)) + as_int(IsHeroInFormation(125)))) <= 3) || hero_id == 99 || hero_id == 125 || hero_id == 136

variants.name: 15 minutes to Doomsday
variants.restrictionsText:
Every 50 areas starting at area 1, a 15 minute countdown starts. If the countdown hits zero before getting through the 50 areas, every Champion in the formation is removed and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.
Anytime there are less than 10 minutes left in the countdown you can't remove Champions from the formation.

variants.name: 10 Minutes to Doomsday
variants.restrictionsText:
Every 50 areas starting at area 1, a 10 minute countdown starts. If the countdown hits zero before getting through the 50 areas, every Champion in the formation is removed and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.
Anytime there are less than 7 minutes left in the countdown you can't remove Champions from the formation. This restriction is removed when the countdown timer reaches 0 until the countdown starts again.

variants.name: Evil to the Core
variants.restrictionsText: You may only use Evil Champions

variants.name: Tomb of Champions
variants.restrictionsText:
You must complete area 150 within 30 minutes of starting the objective.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 5.

variants.name: Tomb of Champions II: Funky Fandango
variants.restrictionsText:
You must complete area 300 within 30 minutes of starting the objective.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 5.

variants.name: Tomb of Champions III: Zany Zephyr Zip
variants.restrictionsText:
You must complete area 450 within 30 minutes of starting the objective.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 5.

variants.name: See You on the Flipside
variants.restrictionsText:
All positional formation abilities are inverted.
Undead monsters deal +400% additional damage and move at twice their normal speed.

variants.name: Mixing It Up
variants.restrictionsText:
After area 25, you can't add, move, or remove Champions.
After every 50 areas, Champions not in the front column are randomly placed in the formation.

variants.name: Misaligned in Sigil
variants.restrictionsText:
All Champion damage is reduced by 99% for each Champion in the formation that shares an exact alignment with another Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
Two fools join the formation. They just get in the way.

variants.name: Undertakings in Sigil
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Good Champions.
1-2 Heralds of Dust Remnants spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Chaos Theory
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
1-2 additional Harmonium Peacekeepers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Necessary Evil
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Evil Champions.
1-2 additional Harmonium Peacekeepers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.
When a Champion is defeated, they are captured by the guard, removed from the formation and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.

variants.name: The Misfortune's Wheel
variants.restrictionsText:
Gold Find is reduced by 99%.
You may not use Champions with the Gold Find role.

variants.name: Fortune's Folly
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Good Champions.
Morte joins the formation. Champions adjacent to Morte don't deal damage.

variants.name: A Gnome in the Mortuary
variants.restrictionsText:
Avren starts in the formation. He can be moved but not removed.
You may only use Champions that are partially or totally neutral.

variants.name: A Hitch in the Mortuary
variants.restrictionsText:
Must have Hitch unlocked. Sign up for the newsletter in the Main Menu to get him!
You may only use Champions that are Chaotic and/or Good.
Hitch joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Two other Hitches take up two slots in the formation, but are confused and don't attack.
1-2 Merregons spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: We've Got Swords and Flames
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not use Champions with ranged (normal) attacks.
Each enemy wave that spawns increases the speed and damage of all enemies by 100%, stacking additively and reset with each area change.

variants.name: We Take It Fey by Fey
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not use Champions with melee attacks.
Each enemy wave that spawns increases the speed and damage of all enemies by 100%, stacking additively and resetting with each area change.
1-2 Pixies spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Lawfulwork
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Lawful Champions.
Champions' normal attack cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.

variants.name: Frozenwork
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 2 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
It's snowing heavily in all areas.
1-2 White Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.
After area 10, every 5 seconds a falling piece of ice hits a random Champion dealing damage equal to 25% of their max health and stunning them for 5 seconds.

variants.name: The Lion, the Witch, and the Wyrmling
variants.restrictionsText:
A global debuff is applied that increases monster health by 1000%, monster speed by 100%, and area requirements by 100%. 
This debuff stacks multiplicatively three times, with one stack being removed for each Tabaxi Champion in the formation.

variants.name: Whisker Whisk
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 3 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
Three black cats join the formation. They adorably just take up space.
1-2 Green Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Time Inversion
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not use Chaotic champions.
Eonstaryx joins the formation. Champions next to Eonstaryx attack faster as their attack cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds, while everyone else's attack cooldown is increased by 10 seconds.

variants.name: Automata's Arbiters
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Lawful and/or Chaotic Champions.
Three Modrons appear in each area. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Every 10 areas, an additional Modron spawns, capped at 50 Modrons.

variants.name: Dessert in the Desert
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Good Champions.
Every 5 seconds, a scoop of ice cream hits a random Champion, stunning them for 10 seconds.

variants.name: Frozen Dessert in the Desert
variants.restrictionsText:
The weather is snowing in all areas.
You may only use Neutral Champions (on the good/evil axis).
Every 5 seconds, a scoop of ice cream hits a random Champion, stunning them for 10 seconds.
1-2 Polar Bears spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Clockwise Through the Great Wheel
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Neutral Champions and Champions of the alignment(s) specified below.
For the first 100 areas, you may use Lawful or Good champions. Every 100 areas, this restriction changes: 
1-100: Lawful or Good. 101-200: Neutral or Good. 201-300: Chaotic or Good.  301-400: Chaotic or Neutral. 401-500: Chaotic or Evil. 501-600: Neutral or Evil. 601-700: Lawful or Evil. 701-800: Lawful or Neutral. Then back to 801-900: Lawful or Good.
This restriction is linked to your highest area completed, not your current area.
When changing areas, Champions that are not eligible in the new area are automatically removed from the formation, but can be placed back in once they're eligible again.

variants.name: Twice Through the Great Wheel
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Neutral Champions and Champions of the alignment(s) specified below.
For the first 100 areas, you may use Lawful Good champions. Every 100 areas, this restriction changes: Neutral Good for area 101-200, Chaotic Good for area 201-300, and so forth. This restriction is linked to your highest area completed, not your current area.
Every 100 areas, all Champions in the formation are removed and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't otherwise be removed from the formation once they've been added.
Click damage only deals damage for the first 5 areas after every alignment switch.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure.

variants.name: Stench of Death
variants.restrictionsText:
1-2 Emperor Vecna Cultists spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may only use Champions with a Constitution of 16 or higher.

variants.name: Friends and Fiends
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Charisma of 17 or higher.
1-2 Quasits spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
A Night Hag boss spawns at the start of each Boss area. It must also be defeated to progress.

variants.name: Mordenkainen's Moment
variants.restrictionsText:
Mordenkainen joins the formation.
You may only place champions with Magic base attacks next to Mordenkainen.

variants.name: Alustriel's Arrival
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with an Intelligence of 14 or higher.
Alustriel joins the formation.
You may only place champions with Magic base attacks next to Alustriel.

variants.name: Swords at the Ready
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not use Champions with the DPS role unless they have the Fighter class.
The Book of Tarchamus joins the formation.
Good Champions next to the Book aren't revived and don't heal when changing areas.

variants.name: Tiamat's Terrors
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 5 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
2-3 Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.
An additional Young Dragon Boss spawns in each boss area. It must also be defeated to progress.
All Dragon enemies move 100% faster and deal 400% additional damage.

variants.name: The Messenger of the Kitten Lord
variants.restrictionsText:
Alvina joins the formation.
Champions adjacent to Alvina have their base attack cooldowns doubled due to the distracting cuteness, unless they are Tabaxi.
1-2 Wild Dogs spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

effects.effect_name: The Messenger of the Kitten Lord Debuff

variants.name: Foul Air
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 12 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
The air in the Heart of Havock is foul. The weather is Fog in all areas, and Champions lose 1% of their max health every second.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area.
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.

variants.name: Lend a Hand
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Champions with a Melee base attack can be used.
Every time an enemy is defeated a Crawling Claw spawns in its place.
These Crawling Claws can not be slowed or stunned. The also don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Deadly Dragons
variants.restrictionsText:
Champions from Seat 6 must have the DPS role. You can't use any other Champions with the DPS role.
A Bronze Dragon joins the formation. It takes up two spots in the formation, but doesn't do much else.
1-2 Black Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.
An additional Young Black Dragon Boss spawns in each boss area. It must also be defeated to progress.

variants.name: No Good Options
variants.restrictionsText:
Only Evil Champions can be used.
Each Chaotic Champion in the formation increases enemy health by 100%.
Each Neutral Champion in the formation increases enemy speed by 100%.
Each Lawful Champion in the formation increases enemy damage by 100%.
Each of the above effects stack multiplicatively.

variants.name: No Slow Options
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are quicker than they are charismatic.
1-2 Warforged spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
Enemies move 200% faster and attack twice as often.

variants.name: Chronepsis's Legacy
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are Neutral on both axes and/or Dragonborn Champions.
Dragonborn Champions attack more often as their normal attack cooldown is 2 seconds faster.

variants.name: Infernal Legacy
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Lawful Champions and/or Tiefling Champions.
Graz'zt joins the formation. Champions next to him deal no damage unless they are Evil and/or Tieflings.

variants.name: Glory to Glorium
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Good, Chaotic Neutral and/or Neutral Good Champions.
All non-boss area requirements are increased by 25%. If Freely is in the formation, this restriction does not apply.

variants.name: Heroes of the Hour
variants.restrictionsText: You must complete area 1050 within 60 minutes of starting the variant.

variants.name: Above Average
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with all ability scores at 11 or higher.
1-2 Vampires sent by Strahd spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Prime Time
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions in seats 2, 3, 5, 7, and 11.
There is a 50% chance that Vecna spawns in the first wave of every area. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Oh, the Humanity!
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Human Champions.
A random Champion takes damage equal to a percentage of their max health every second (in real time). The percentage starts at 10% and increases by 10% (additively) every 100 areas. Damage does not trigger for the first 5 (real time) seconds in every area.
1-2 Vampires sent by Strahd spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Get to the Point
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Elf and Half-Elf Champions.
A random Champion takes damage equal to a percentage of their max health every second (in real time). The percentage starts at 10% and increases by 10% (additively) every 100 areas. Damage does not trigger for the first 5 (real time) seconds in every area.
1-2 Vampires sent by Strahd spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: Song and Silence
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Rogue and Bard Champions.
Champions with a Charisma of 18 or higher have their positional formation abilities increased by 100%.

variants.name: Tome and Blood
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Wizard and Sorcerer Champions.
Champions with an Intelligence of 18 or higher have their positional formation abilities increased by 100%.
There is a 50% chance that Vecna spawns in the first wave of every area. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress. Other monsters have their speed and damage increased by 300% while this Vecna is present.

variants.name: R04M Where You Want To
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not use Good Champions.
R04M joins the formation. Champions next to R04M attack 0.5 seconds slower for every 100 areas completed.

variants.name: Wherever I May R04M
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Good and/or Evil Champions.
Whenever a Good Champion is adjacent to an Evil Champion, neither Champion deals any damage.
R04M joins the formation.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Somnus, Nightmare Warrior joins every boss area as an additional boss that must be defeated to progress.

variants.name: Fully Aligned
variants.restrictionsText:
R04M joins the formation. He doesn't do much other than get in the way.
You may not have two Champions in the formation with the exact same base alignment.

variants.name: Somewhat Aligned
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are completely or partially Neutral.
Enemy Damage is multiplicatively increased by 10% every second, and resets upon changing areas.

variants.name: Four Corners
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Lawful Good, Chaotic Good, Lawful Evil, and/or Chaotic Evil Champions.
In each non-boss area, there is a 25% chance 5 Modrons spawn before the first wave. The number of Modrons spawned increases by 5 for every 50 areas completed, capped at 50 Modrons. They drop no gold, nor count towards quest progress.
While any Modron enemy is alive, non-Modron enemies can't take damage.

variants.name: Strike Force
variants.restrictionsText:
When there are more than 5 Champions in the formation, for each extra Champion above 5:
- Champions attack 2 seconds slower, stacking additively.
- In non-boss areas, an Overambitious City Guard with 20 armor based hits has a 20% chance (stacking additively) of spawning with each wave. Other enemies are immune to damage while any Overambitious City Guards are alive.
- There is a 20% chance (stacking additively) that a Devourer spawns in each boss area that must also be defeated to progress.

variants.name: Aligned in Purpose
variants.restrictionsText:
A random Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed.
You may only use Champions that have the same initial alignment as the chosen Champion's initial alignment.

variants.name: Windy Day
variants.restrictionsText:
The Weather is Windy in each area. Champions with Ranged attacks deal no damage with their normal attacks due to the blustery weather.
You may only use Neutral Good Champions.
1-2 Steam Mephits spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
An Air Elemental spawns as an additional boss in each boss area. They must also be defeated to progress.

variants.name: Eye Spy
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not have two Champions in the formation with the same base species.
1-2 Gazers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
In each boss area, an additional Beholder boss with more health than normal spawns with the second wave. All other monsters are immune to damage until this Beholder is defeated.

variants.name: Eye Eye, Captain!
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Fighters, Rogues, and Rangers.
1 Gazer spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. The number of gazers increases by 1 every 100 areas, to a maximum of 10 Gazers at area 901 and beyond
In each boss area, an additional Beholder boss with more health than normal spawns with the second wave. All other monsters are immune to damage until this Beholder is defeated.

variants.name: Return of the Lone Wolf Party
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that don't belong to an affiliation.
Riffel (in werewolf form) joins the formation as an escort.
Champions next to Riffel take damage equal to 5% of their total health every second due to his werewolf-y nature.

variants.name: The Foggy Tree
variants.restrictionsText:
Areas with no weather are instead dark and foggy due to the Shadowfell's influence.
You may only use Champions with a Melee base attack.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.

variants.name: The Old Ways
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are 100 years old or older.
In each Boss Area, Lord Soth spawns as an additional boss that must be defeated to progress.

variants.name: The Gifted Ways
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a total ability score of 85 or higher.
Enemies attack twice as often.
Enemy Speed is multiplicatively increased by 10% every second. This speed increase is capped after 40 seconds and resets upon changing areas.

variants.name: Snakes on a Material Plane
variants.restrictionsText:
Due to the debilitating snake venom, you may only use Champions with a CON of 14 or higher.
Whenever a Champion deals Melee damage to a flying snake enemy, or is damaged by a flying snake enemy, they are transformed into a flying snake for 5 seconds, stunning them for the duration. 
1-2 flying snakes spawn with each wave and move 200% faster.

variants.name: Frosty Reception
variants.restrictionsText:
The weather is snowing in all areas.
You may only use Champions with a Dexterity of 15 or higher.
1-2 Frosty Giant Rats spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
A Frost Giant joins the formation.

variants.name: The False Lich's Hold
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a Magic base attack.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Whenever a champion dies, Rerak the False Lich disrupts their soul and they are unavailable for the next 5 minutes of real time.

variants.name: Specter of Death
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not use Lawful Champions unless they are Undead.
A Specter joins the formation. Every second, the Specter drains the life of adjacent Champions equal to 10% of their maximum health. Undead Champions are immune to this damage.

variants.name: Racing Through Avernus
variants.restrictionsText: Every 5 minutes of real time, all enemies' health and damage is increased by 100%, stacking multiplicatively. Better go fast!

variants.name: Infernal Inferno
variants.restrictionsText:
You may not use Good Champions unless they are Tieflings.
A Fire Elemental joins the formation.Every second, the Fire Elemental deals damage to adjacent Champions equal to 10% of their maximum health. Tiefling Champions are immune to this damage.

variants.name: Ante Up
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with the Gold Find role.
Windfall joins the formation. 
2-3 Red Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.
The house always wins. Monsters drop 10% less gold (stacking multiplicatively) for every second you spend in an area.

variants.name: Double Down
variants.restrictionsText:
Every time an enemy spawns, a copy also spawns.
Each non-static boss spawns with a copy that must also be defeated to progress.
Static bosses spawn with double the health.
You may only use Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or less, but all Champion base attack cooldowns are doubled.

variants.name: The House Always Wins
variants.restrictionsText:
The formation slots are colored Red, Black and two glowing Green slots.
A giant roulette ball joins the formation as an escort.
Starting upon entering area 101, and every 100 areas thereafter, the giant roulette ball jumps up and spins around in a circle above the formation before landing on a random formation slot, removing that Champion and all other Champions that are in a formation slot of the same color. Removed Champions can't be used for the rest of the adventure, and the ball stays in that slot until it moves again.
Champions can't otherwise be removed from the formation once they've been added.

variants.name: Double or Nothing
variants.restrictionsText:
The formation slots are colored Red, Black and two glowing Green slots.
A giant roulette ball joins the formation as an escort
Starting upon entering area 76, and every 75 areas thereafter, the giant roulette ball jumps up and spins around in a circle above the formation before landing on a random formation slot, removing that Champion and all other Champions that are in a formation slot of the same color. Removed Champions can't be used for the rest of the adventure, and the ball stays in that slot until it moves again.
Champions can't otherwise be removed from the formation once they've been added.
Click damage only deals damage (including fire breath effects) for the first 25 areas.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure.

variants.name: Panda-monium
variants.restrictionsText:
Every wave spawns 1-2 Illusory Fancy Red Pandas. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
Every time a Red Panda is defeated, enemy damage and movement speed is increased by 50%, stacking multiplicatively and resetting when changing areas. You may only use Evil Champions, as only Evil Champions have the heart to attack these adorable Red Pandas. You should be ashamed of yourself for encouraging this behavior.

variants.name: Random-onium
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
Each time a Champion attacks, their next base attack cooldown is randomly set to a time between 1 and 20 seconds.
Each enemy spawns with a random buff: Speed is increased by 500%, Damage is increased by 500%, or Health is increased by 500%. This includes boss enemies.

variants.name: The Relentless War of Pandesmos
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are a Standard species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
A Drow Priestess joins the formation. 
Each wave, 1-2 Giant Spiders attack. When defeated, they respawn in the same location after 5 seconds unless defeated by a Champion next to the Drow Priestess.

variants.name: The Fiery War of Pandesmos
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are NOT a Standard Species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
1-2 fiery foes spawn with each wave. These enemies have 300% speed, and they don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.

variants.name: The Ruinous Bosses
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions that are not a Standard species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
Aarakocra Champions break 3 times the amount of armored or segmented health when they deal damage.
Bosses cannot be moved, rooted, or stunned, except in extraordinary circumstances, and they immediately start to enrage upon spawning.
All boss monsters have at least 25 armored health.

variants.name: Betraying the Betrayer
variants.restrictionsText:
You may only use Champions with a total ability score of 80 or higher.
Every 50 areas, the Champion with the lowest base DPS betrays the party and leaves the formation for the rest of the adventure. This does not affect Kas if he is in the formation. If Kas has the lowest DPS, the Champion with the second lowest DPS leaves instead.
After area 25, you can't otherwise remove Champions from the formation.

variants.name: Lending a Hand and Eye
variants.restrictionsText:
Undead enemies speed and damage are increased by 300%.
The Eye and Hand of Vecna join the formation. You may only place Wizard Champions next to the Eye, and you may only place Champions with a Strength of 18 or higher next to the Hand.

variants.name: Hunting For A Good Meal
variants.restrictionsText: Ezmerelda starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. Only Champions with the Hunter role (like Ezmerelda or Minsc) can deal damage. You can still use other Champions to tank, support, or heal, they just won't deal damage. 1-2 Zombies loyal to Strahd spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Enemies have 1000% more health, but enemies that are a Favored Foe for any Champion take 400% additional damage. Getting to know Idle Champions: Champions with the Hunter role usually have Favored Foes, granting your Champions an advantage against enemies of specific types.

variants.name: Swimming In Debuff
variants.restrictionsText:
Ezmerelda starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with the Debuff role.
Enemies without a debuff applied to them only take 1 damage from all attacks, move 400% faster, and deal 800% more damage.

variants.name: Breaker Breaker
variants.restrictionsText:
Ezmerelda starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Champions without the Breaker role have their base damage permanently set to 1.
An ogre carrying a battering ram takes up 3 slots in the formation.
All boss enemies have 25 armored health if they don't have segmented or armored health already.
Strahd spawns as an extra boss in every boss area. He must also be defeated to progress.

variants.name: The Pugilists That Push
variants.restrictionsText: Catti-brie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. Enemies take significantly less damage the closer they get to the formation. Use Champions that knock back enemies to get around this problem!
